entries.title: IGDA Japan to Hold Indie Game Development Investment Seminar on April 8

entries.description: Mobius Dust," an original TV animation produced by Animation Studio, will be broadcast this year in 2026. The main staff, teaser visual, and teaser PV of the work have all been revealed.

entries.title: OVER MATE," in which a hero fighting evil must choose between mission and friendship.

entries.title: Ao Kojima's childhood dream comes true with "I could sell books" Ao Kojima wins Manga Grand Prize "Thank you to all.
entries.title_ja: 「本なら売るほど」で幼少期の夢叶う　児島青がマンガ大賞受賞「すべての方に感謝を」
entries.description: Ao Kojima's "Hon nara Sell It" was selected as the Grand Prize winner of the "Manga Grand Prize 2026". The award ceremony was held today, March 26, at the small hall of Hamarikyu Asahi Hall in Tokyo, and Kohei Asai, the editor in charge of the manga, attended the ceremony on behalf of Kojima. The presenter was Kiko Sono, who won the Grand Prize last time for "Alice, Even to the Universe," and Naoki Yoshida served as MC.

entries.title: Concert to be held in April to enjoy "April is Your Lie" with scenes from the film, featuring Risa Taneda

entries.description: Naoshi Shinkawa's "April is Your Lie" event, "April is Your Lie: A Concert Performed with Original Drawings," will be held on April 22 at Dai-ichi Seimei Hall in Tokyo.

entries.title: Commemorative signing by Sumu Kamiyama of "Haemiya-senpai wa kiirai kawaii" at the book launch of the second volume.

entries.description: Sumu Kamiyama, the author of "Haemiya senpai wa kiira ni kawaii" will hold a signing event at Kinokuniya Shinjuku main store in Tokyo on May 10, 2012.

entries.title: The third season of "Ranma 1/2" will start in October! Visuals and PV to be unveiled.

entries.description: The third season of the TV anime "Ranma 1/2," written by Rumiko Takahashi, will be broadcast sequentially nationwide on NTV from October and distributed exclusively on Netflix. The teaser visual and the first PV of the third season have been released.

entries.title: Volume 1 of "The Magic Wand Craftsman of the Collapsed World" goes on sale; voice comic adaptation of the first episode by Saya Aizawa & Haruki Ishitani.

entries.description: Nori Kazato's "The Magic Wand Craftsman of the Collapsed World" volume 1 was released today, March 26. It is a comic adaptation of a novel by Kurotome Hagane.

entries.title: Reincarnated daughter "Shurahime" survives corrupt aristocratic society with the knowledge of administrative scrivener, vol. 1.

entries.title: Action Control DX Transformation Belt Sun Riser" from "Kamen Rider BLACK RX" is open for reservation from March 26, 16:00 at Pre-Ban.

entries.description: Bandai will begin accepting pre-orders for the "Action Control DX Transformation Belt Sun Riser," a Nari-Kiri toy, on March 26 at 16:00 on the Premium Bandai online shopping site. The product is scheduled to ship in September and will be priced at 22,000 yen.

entries.title: HUNTER x HUNTER" from "HUNTER x HUNTER" Machi is three-dimensional in the POP UP PARADE series!

entries.description: Max Factory will re-release the action figure "figma Gaiber I Ultimate Edition" in November. The price is 12,800 yen.

entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS is exhibiting the "METAL BUILD Nirvash type ZERO RS," scheduled for release in August, at the "METAL BUILD EXPO" to be held from March 27 to July 6.

entries.description: KATO will release a model train "Series E233-7000 Saikyo Line 40th Anniversary Wrapping First Car Set" on March 28. The price is 8,800 yen.

entries.title: Bismarck" from "Azur Lane" will be released as a 1/7th scale figure in "Unpacked Surprise" outfit in March 2027!
entries.title_ja: 「アズールレーン」より「ビスマルク」が着せ替え衣装「アンパックド・サプライズ」の姿で1/7スケールフィギュア化！2027年3月発売予定
entries.description: Good Smile Arts Shanghai will release the figure "Bismarck Unpacked Surprise Ver." in March 2027. Orders will be taken until May 20. The price is 28,600 yen.

entries.title: From "Shinobi Master Senran Kagura NEW LINK" comes a 1/4 scale figure of Nikage in a bondage maid outfit from Donki Colabo! Faithfully sculpted to Yaegashi Minami's design!

entries.description: Freeing will release the figure "Hikage Bondage Maid Ver." in September. The price is 39,600 yen.

entries.title: The electronic diva will be sculpted by METAL BUILD! METAL BUILD Hatsune Miku" will be released in October. The figure will be on display for the first time at the "METAL BUILD EXPO" event starting on March 27.
entries.title_ja: 電子の歌姫がメタルビルドで立体化！ 「METAL BUILD 初音ミク」10月発売決定。 4月3日より予約開始予定3月27日からのイベント「METAL BUILD EXPO」にて初展示
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will release the action figure "METAL BUILD Hatsune Miku" in October, with pre-orders scheduled to begin on April 3 at a price of 36,300 yen.

entries.title: Special re-release of "METAL BUILD Kempfer" to commemorate the event! Details to be unveiled at a later dateRe-release of Movable Figure from "Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket" to be released in February 2024

entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS announced a special re-release of the "METAL BUILD Kempfer" action figure.

entries.title: Undersea Facility Exploration Horror "Cthulhu: The Cosmic Abyss" Releases Latest Trailer Explaining Information on Surviving the Abyss
entries.title_ja: 海底施設探索ホラー「Cthulhu: The Cosmic Abyss」，深淵を生き延びるための情報を解説する最新トレイラーを公開
entries.description: Nacon today (March 26, 2026) released its latest trailer explaining the gameplay of its new title "Cthulhu:TheCosmicAbyss," scheduled for release on April 17. In the video, Noah's sidekick, Key, an AI assistant, explains the information players need to know in order to survive in the main game.

entries.title: MONOPHOBIA," a side-scrolling ADV in HD-2D with a story that progresses by solving puzzles and deducing mysteries, opens on the Steam store page.
entries.title_ja: 謎解きと推理で物語が進行するHD-2Dで描かれた横スクロールADV「MONOPHOBIA」，Steamストアページを公開
entries.description: CandidumGames today released the Steam store page for MONOPHOBIA, a PC game developed by Dendrobium. The game is an HD-2D side-scrolling ADV in which the story progresses through puzzle solving and deduction. Players use their characters' special abilities to gather clues, organize information, and get closer to the truth of the case.

entries.title: Report on the 31st AMD Awards Ceremony, looking back on digital content in 2025. Excellence Award winners include "Urban Legend Dismantling Center" and Switch 2.
entries.title_ja: 2025年のデジタルコンテンツを振り返る，第31回AMDアワードの授賞式をレポート。優秀賞に「都市伝説解体センター」やSwitch 2など
entries.description: The award ceremony for the "Digital Content of the Year '25/31st AMD Awards" sponsored by the Digital Media Association of Japan was held at the Imperial Hotel. The following is a report on the award ceremony, where "Urban Legend Dismantling Center," "NintendoSwitch2," and the movie "Exit 8" were selected for the Excellence Award among game-related contents.

entries.title: Success in a world of swords and magic. Power Pro Adventures," an SRPG game for smartphones, is released today. New commercial video "Surprise" is released.
entries.title_ja: 剣と魔法の世界で“サクセス”できる。スマホ向け育成SRPG「パワプロアドベンチャーズ」本日配信。新作CM映像「驚き編」を公開
entries.description: KONAMI today launched "Power Pro Adventures," a new title for smartphones. The latest title in the "Pawapuro" series takes place in a fantasy world of swords and sorcery, and offers a training simulation RPG utilizing the familiar "Success" system.

entries.title: Hypnosis Mike -Alternative Rap Battle- 2nd period" to be released on July 16th, with cards in the game as a bonus linked to the first game.
entries.title_ja: 「ヒプノシスマイク -Alternative Rap Battle- 2nd period」，7月16日に発売。1作目との連動特典はゲーム内のカード
entries.description: Alt Plus announced today that "Hypnosis Mike-AlternativeRapBattle-2ndperiod" for Switch will be released on July 16, 2026. This title is the second installment of a work that includes the contents of the smartphone app "Hypnosis Mike-AlternativeRapBattle-," which has a story that differs from the original CD.

entries.title: FFBE "Phantom War" Service to End on May 28th. Grand Finale" events to be held in and outside the game.
entries.title_ja: 「FFBE幻影戦争」，5月28日にサービス終了。ゲーム内外で「グランドフィナーレ」イベントを開催
entries.description: Square Enix announced today (March 26, 2026) that WAROFTHEVISIONS FINAL FANTASY BRAVE EXVIOUS GENSOUS WAR will end its service on May 28 at 12:00 p.m. The service was launched in November 2019, and after nearly six and a half years of operation After six and a half years of operation, the game will bring the curtain down on its history.

entries.title: Cotton Rock with You" will be released on August 6. In addition to shooting, the fully voiced adventure part can also be enjoyed.
entries.title_ja: 「コットンロックウィズユー」，8月6日に発売決定。シューティングはもちろん，フルボイスのアドベンチャーパートも楽しめる
entries.description: Success announced today (March 26, 2026) that the shooting game "Cotton Rock with You" will be released on August 6. This time, a total of 10 characters will participate in the game, eight of whom appeared in the previous "Cotton Rock 'n' Roll" game, plus two additional characters, for a total of 16 stages to conquer.

entries.title: hololive Dreams," the first official smartphone game app for "Hololive," has received over 500,000 pre-registrations; "Dot Sunglasses" will be given away when the number reaches 1 million.
entries.title_ja: 「ホロライブ」初の公式スマホゲームアプリ「hololive Dreams」，事前登録が50万人を突破。100万人達成で「ドットサングラス」をプレゼント
entries.description: QualiArts announced today that the number of pre-registrations for "hololiveDreams," a smartphone application being developed in collaboration with Cover, has exceeded 500,000. To commemorate this milestone, a "special truck" with designs of each of the 54 talents appearing in the app will be operated in multiple cities in Japan and abroad.

entries.title: SP(L/R)ITE: Sprite," a short ADV in which cooperation is proposed in a death game, will be released on April 9. Aiming to escape from a room floating in a different space.
entries.title_ja: デスゲームで協力を提案される短編ADV「SP(L/R)ITE：スプライト」，4月9日にリリース。異空間に浮かぶ部屋からの脱出を目指す
entries.description: WakuWaku Games today announced that its new title "SP(L/R)ITE: Sprite" will be released on April 9. This title is a short adventure game in which the player aims to escape from a room floating in a different space. A stone statue "Acreada," who claims to be the goddess of fate, forces you to play a death game of escape, but your neighbor "Gene," who lives behind the wall, offers to help you.

entries.title: Cinematic ADV "Directive 8020", set in the depths of the universe, PS5 Pro Trailer. High-definition and realistic graphics can be seen.
entries.title_ja: 宇宙の深淵を舞台にするシネマティックADV「Directive 8020」，PS5 Proトレイラーを公開。高精細でリアルなグラフィックスを確認できる
entries.description: SupermassiveGames has released the latest trailer for its cinematic ADV "Directive8020," which shows realistic graphics that take advantage of the PS5Pro's performance. The video introduces ray tracing, lighting effects, smoother facial expressions and animation processing. An introduction trailer of the player characters was also released.

entries.title: World of Tanks: HEAT" Video Introduces Four Game Modes, Including 10-on-10 Conquest and 5-on-5 Hardpoint
entries.title_ja: 「World of Tanks:HEAT」，10対10のコンクエストや5対5のハードポイントなど，4つのゲームモードを紹介する映像が公開に
entries.description: Wargaming today (March 26, 2026) released the third episode of "Foundation," a series of videos on the game's official YouTube channel that showcases the appeal of the WorldofTanks:HEAT title currently in development. In this video, four game modes are introduced. The maps that appear in the game are based on real locations.

entries.title: Cooking dungeon exploration game "Deep Dish Dungeon" to be released in fall 2026 with Japanese language support.
entries.title_ja: お料理ダンジョン探索ゲーム「Deep Dish Dungeon」，2026年秋に日本語対応でリリース決定
entries.description: BeholdStudios today (March 26, 2026) released a developer blog for its new title in development, DeepDishDungeon, and announced that it will be available in multiple languages, including Japanese. The latest trailer was shown at the recent FutureGamesShow, where it was revealed that the game will be released in the fall of 2026.

entries.title: MotoGP 26" gameplay trailer is now available. You can check the races in various conditions, such as sunny and rainy, from various perspectives.
entries.title_ja: 「MotoGP 26」，ゲームプレイトレイラーを公開。晴天や雨天など多彩なコンディションでのレースを，さまざまな視点から確認できる
entries.description: On March 25, 2026, Milestone released a gameplay trailer for MotoGP26. In the video, you can check out the races in various conditions, such as sunny and rainy, from various perspectives. Check out the riders' movements that reflect the new physics model and the detailed graphics.

entries.title: A former hero reunites with a former saint working as a bunny girl and starts a "whatever-you-want-like" business in the big city.
entries.title_ja: バニーガールとして働く元聖女と再会した元英雄、大都会で“何でも屋っぽいの”を始める
entries.description: Aomi "Former Hero is the Strongest Handyman in the Metropolis, Solving All Troubles with Former Saint Bunny Girl" volume 1 was released today, March 25, by Nova Comics of Ichijisan Shobo. It is a comic adaptation based on a novel by Fumitoki Shikura.

entries.title: First love you'll never see again becomes a VTuber, a love story over 10 years "Nice to meet you #FirstLoveDistributing".
entries.title_ja: 二度と会えない初恋の人がVTuberに、10年越しの恋物語「はじめまして #初恋配信中」
entries.description: Torimura "Nice to meet you #First Love Delivered" volume 1 was released today, March 25, from Square Enix. It is a love comedy that begins with a reunion with a neighbor's sister who was supposed to have died of illness.

entries.title: Production of the 4th and Final Season of the anime "[Mystery Child]" decided, visuals and special video released.
entries.title_ja: アニメ「【推しの子】」第4期 Final Seasonの制作決定、ビジュアル＆特報映像公開
entries.description: The production of the 4th Final Season of the TV anime "[Pushy Child]", written by Akasaka Aka and Mengo Yokojari, has been decided.

entries.title: List of manga magazines for sale tomorrow, Thursday, March 26
entries.title_ja: 明日3月26日（木）発売分のマンガ雑誌リスト
entries.description: Comic Natalie is pleased to announce that a manga magazine will be released tomorrow, Thursday, March 26.

entries.title: Reincarnated Goblins, Any Questions?" Teaser PV featuring Akira and other unique goblins
entries.title_ja: 「転生ゴブリンだけど質問ある？」アキラや個性豊かなゴブリンたち登場のティザーPV
entries.description: The teaser PV of the TV anime "Reincarnated Goblin, Any Questions? by Zuna Miki and Zai Araki, has been released.

entries.title: Trailer for the live-action film "Mobuko no Koi," the story of Nobuko, who has been watching the "heroes" from afar.
entries.title_ja: 実写映画「モブ子の恋」の本予告映像、“主人公”たちを遠くから眺めてきた信子の物語
entries.description: The trailer and additional cast for the live-action film "Mobuko no Koi" based on the original story by Akane Tamura have been announced.

entries.title: City Hunter" sequel to be produced and distributed exclusively on Netflix in 2027!
entries.title_ja: 映画「シティーハンター」続編制作決定！2027年にNetflixで独占配信
entries.description: A sequel to the Netflix film "City Hunter," based on Tsukasa Hojo's novel, is set for worldwide exclusive distribution on Netflix in 2027.

entries.title: Kingdom: Decisive Battle of the Souls" starring Jun Shizon as Mongchun, Kaedeju Kamio as Wang Bin, and Kenji Sakaguchi as Wang Bin.
entries.title_ja: 「キングダム 魂の決戦」蒙恬役は志尊淳、王賁役は神尾楓珠　坂口憲二らも出演
entries.description: The live-action film "Kingdom: The Battle of the Souls," based on the original story by Yasuhisa Hara, stars Jun Shizon, Kaedeju Kamio, Kenji Sakaguchi, Ayumi Tanida, Yajuro Bando, Satoshi Hashimoto, and Takashi Sasano. A special trailer using footage from the film has also been released for the first time.

entries.title: Amazon Sale] Deals on Iris Ohyama vacuum cleaners. Cyclone cordless vacuum cleaner "Magicalina" Amazon exclusive model, etc.
entries.title_ja: 【Amazonセール】アイリスオーヤマの掃除機がお買い得。サイクロン式コードレス掃除機「マジカリーナ」Amazon限定モデルなど
entries.description: Special prices on Iris Oyama vacuum cleaners are available on Amazon. The period is until April 6, 23:59.

entries.description: Fujimi Mokei will start shipping plastic model "1/200 Equipment 2EX-7 Battleship Yamato Upper Structure Set Special Edition (Inner Print Box Version)" on March 26. The price is 16,500 yen.

entries.description: Takara Tomy Arts will release a gacha product, "Manmaru Dobutsu Manmaru Nu Mejirushi Gacha Mascot," in early April. The price is 300 yen per unit.

entries.title: Fujimi Mokei started shipping plastic model "1/24 ISD5EX-1 Savanna RX-7 FC3S Late Type Takahashi Ryosuke Special Spec (w/Character Acrylic Stand)" today!

entries.description: Fujimi Mokei will start shipping the plastic model "1/24 ISD5EX-1 Savanna RX-7 FC3S Late Type Takahashi Ryosuke Special Spec (with character acrylic stand)" on March 26. The price is 3,960 yen.

entries.title: Aerial drone photography】Drone "DJI Mini 2 SE" photographed a crumbling islet floating in the sea!　Let's take a look at the "backside" of the island that cannot be seen from the opposite shore!
entries.title_ja: 【ドローン空撮】ドローン「DJI Mini 2 SE」で海に浮かぶ崩れゆく小島を撮影！　対岸からは見えない“裏側”をドローンで見てみよう！
entries.description: The flying camera "aerial drone" is a tool that fulfills a fundamental human wish: to fly. Flying up like a bird and seeing the world from its unique perspective. There is no other tool that makes it as easy as a drone to enjoy a walk in the sky.

entries.title: The past and future of the Print Sticker Machine culture will be gathered in Shibuya. The "Our Pre Exhibition - Dear 2025 by Heisei" is a chance to experience the "legend". Attention of all mankind!
entries.title_ja: プリントシール機文化のこれまで・これからが渋谷に集結。「ウチらのプリ展 〜Dear令和 By平成〜」は“伝説”を体験するチャンス。全人類注目！
entries.description: An event commemorating the 30th anniversary of the Print Sticker Machine, "Our Pre Exhibition - Dear 2026 by Heisei" will be held at OPENBASE Shibuya in Tokyo from March 20 to April 5, 2026. Prior to the event, a preview was held for related parties and the media.

entries.title: Management simulation "Sintopia," which aims to punish sinful souls and prosper in hell, will be released on Steam on April 17, Japan time.
entries.title_ja: 罪深い魂を罰して地獄の繁栄を目指す経営シミュレーション「Sintopia」，日本時間の4月17日にSteamでリリース
entries.description: Team17 announced today (March 25, 2026) that its new title "Sintopia" will be released on April 17, 2026 Japan time. In this dark comedy-style strategy and management simulation game, players take on the role of an administrator who controls the bureaucratic system of Hell, and leads a group of minions called "Employees" under his command to make Hell prosper.

entries.title: Remake of "OFF", now available for PC & Switch with Japanese language support. New battle system and elements to improve comfort are added.
entries.title_ja: リメイク版「OFF」，日本語対応でPC＆Switch向けに配信。バトルシステムの刷新や快適性の向上を図る要素を追加して登場
entries.description: FangamerJapan released a remake of OFF on March 26, 2026. OFF is a free-to-play game by creator MortisGhost that has influenced many other games. The remake version includes an updated battle system, new areas and bosses, and other additional elements.

entries.title: Pokémon Champions" pre-release trial report. Brushed-up system for "easy-to-play" matches shines through!
entries.title_ja: 「Pokémon Champions」配信前先行体験会レポート。“対戦のしやすさ”を追求したシステム面のブラッシュアップが光る
entries.description: Pokémon will release a NintendoSwitch version of its new title "PokémonChampions" on April 8, 2026. Although some information, such as the battle format, has been disclosed, there are still many aspects of this title that are shrouded in mystery. A preliminary trial event was held for the media prior to the release of the game, and we will report on the event.

entries.title: Ruiki, the creator of the "X68000 Z," has released photos of a mysterious piece of hardware. The appearance does not give an idea of what is inside, so what is the "next challenge"?
entries.title_ja: 「X68000 Z」の瑞起が謎のハードウェアの写真を公開。外見から中身は想像できず，“次なる挑戦”とは何なのか
entries.description: Ruiki, known for its various reissued hardware products, has released a photo of a mysterious hardware on its official X account. It is said to be the company's "next challenge," and there are high expectations for what it will be. The photo seems to be some kind of hardware, but only the company logo "ZUIKI" can be seen, and no details have been revealed.

entries.title: Zombie Survival "NAKWON: LAST PARADISE", Closed Alpha Test Play Data Released. Approximately 280,000 people participated, and more than 32 million infected were defeated.
entries.title_ja: ゾンビサバイバル「NAKWON: LAST PARADISE」，クローズドαテストのプレイデータを公開。参加者約28万人，討伐された感染者は3200万体以上
entries.description: Nexon today released play data from the closed alpha test of NAKWON:LASTPARADISE, a PvPvE zombie survival game in development. The total number of participants is 279,484, and the maximum number of simultaneous connections on Steam is 37,000. An "infographic video" summarizing statistics during the test period is also available.

entries.title: ［Etranger Overlord" is an ACT adventure game that is full of entertainment elements, including a villainess, hell, food, and a musical.
entries.title_ja: ［プレイレポート］「エトランジュ オーヴァーロード」は悪役令嬢×地獄×グルメ×ミュージカルと娯楽要素が満載なACTアドベンチャー
entries.description: Etrange Overlord," which will be released today (March 26, 2026), is an ACT adventure based on a web novel by Sohei Shinkawa (PN. Kitayama Roman), producer of "Ningyo hime of the Kingdom of Mar" and "Makai Senki Disgaea" series, among others. It was developed by Gem Drop and marketed by Broccoli.

entries.title: Mystery ADV "Snoopy and the Exciting Secret Club", gameplay trailer released. It contains about 13 minutes of the first part of the game.
entries.title_ja: ミステリーADV「スヌーピーとワクワクひみつクラブ」，ゲームプレイトレイラーを公開。ゲーム序盤の約13分を収録
entries.description: 3goo today released a gameplay trailer for "Snoopy and the Exciting Secret Club," which the company plans to release on May 14. In this mystery adventure game, Snoopy and his Peanuts friends form a detective club and investigate mysterious cases. Various events are depicted with a bit of dry humor.

entries.title: The Fun Pimps, developer of "7 Days to Die," joins Behaviour Interactive, known for "Dead by Daylight" and other titles.
entries.title_ja: 「7 Days to Die」開発のThe Fun Pimps，「Dead by Daylight」などで知られるBehaviour Interactiveの傘下に加入
entries.description: TheFunPimps, developer of "7DaystoDie," announced today (March 25, 2026) that it has joined the BehaviourInteractive umbrella, known for "DeadbyDaylight" and other titles. To accompany the announcement, a video featuring comments from RichardHuenink, co-founder of TheFunPimps, is available.

entries.title: Retro Rewind, a management sim that brings up a 1990s video rental store from scratch (Almost a Day Indie Pick Up!)
entries.title_ja: 1990年代のレンタルビデオ店をイチから育てる経営シム「Retro Rewind」（ほぼ日 インディーPick Up！）
entries.description: Today's "Almost a Day Indie PickUp!" introduces "RetroRewind-VideoStoreSimulator. This title is a management simulation in which the player becomes the owner of a video rental store in the 1990s and aims to become the best video store in town while performing videotape stocking and rental operations.

entries.title: ［Interview] "DAMON and BABY" is a touchstone for a new development environment. We will create games with unprecedented approaches to ensure a good life as a developer.
entries.title_ja: ［インタビュー］「DAMON and BABY」は新たな開発環境の試金石。よき開発者人生を送ってもらうために，これまでにない取り組みでゲームを作る
entries.description: We spoke with Taisuke Ishiwata and Yuji Ota of Arc System Works about "Damon and Baby," which was released today (March 26, 2026). The new action game, which represents a new frontier for the company, was also an effort to ensure the company's survival in the age of indie games.

entries.title: VTuber Creative Strategies] How do VTubers film their "Sanpo (Vlog)"? How to make the outside location attractive in a way that only real and virtual people can do.
entries.title_ja: 【VTuberのクリエイティブ戦略】VTuberは「さんぽ（Vlog）」をどう撮る？リアル×バーチャルならではの外ロケの魅せ方
entries.description:
The "strolling vlog" video content has become a staple on YouTube. This is a genre that offers new discoveries, such as unexpected stores in a deserted alleyway, or discovering minor aspects of a well-known tourist spot. This kind of strolling […].
The post [Creative Strategies of VTubers] How do VTubers film their "Vlogs"? How to make real x virtual locations more appealing appeared first on Mogura VR.

entries.title: Two New VTubers Join e-Sports Team "REJECT"; Tsurara Shirakuma and Sora Ravenoha to Begin Activities on March 25

entries.description:
Two new VTubers, Tsurara Shirakuma and Sora Ravenous Feather, have joined the streamer division of the e-sports team REJECT. Both of them have been active since March 25, 2026. Tsurara Shirakuma is from "Tsurarando" and […].
The post Two New VTubers Join eSports Team "REJECT"; Tsurara Shirakuma and Sora Karasuwa to Begin Activities on March 25 appeared first on Mogura VR.

entries.title: VTuber "Mika Shikaen" obtains museum curator certification and applies curatorial perspective to her distribution activities.
entries.title_ja: VTuber「鹿苑ミカ」が博物館学芸員資格を取得 配信活動に学芸員の視点を活かす
entries.description:
Shrines & Temples Online, Inc. announced on March 26, 2026 that Mika Shikaen, a VTuber with a spirit animal background, has been certified as a museum curator. Shikaen Mika is a”deer spirit animal” […] with a mission to "convey the charm of shrines and temples to the human world.
The post VTuber "Mika Shikaen" Obtains Museum Curator Certification to Use Curatorial Perspective in Distribution Activities appeared first on Mogura VR.

entries.title: oshiparty" iOS version officially released, a simultaneous viewing application to enjoy anime with VTubers.
entries.title_ja: VTuberと一緒にアニメを楽しめる同時視聴アプリ「oshiparty」iOS版が正式リリース
entries.description:
SnackTime Corporation has officially released the iOS version of "oshiparty," an application that allows users to enjoy simultaneous viewing of anime on a single smartphone. Until now, simultaneous viewing required opening multiple windows on a PC or using a combination of a smartphone and tablet "2 […]".
The post Simultaneous Viewing App "oshiparty" for Enjoying Anime with VTubers iOS Version Officially Released appeared first on Mogura VR.

entries.title: Bank of Japan Unveils "MIRAI," an Economic V-Tuber Explaining the Role of the Bank of Japan in an Educational Video for Junior High School Students

entries.description:
The Bank of Japan has begun distributing "MIRAI, Economic Detective," an educational video featuring economic V-tuber MIRAI. This introductory video, aimed primarily at junior high school students, explains the Bank's role and its operations. It is structured with quizzes […].
The post Bank of Japan Unveils "MIRAI," an Economic V-Tuber Explaining the Role of the Bank of Japan in an Educational Video for Junior High School Students appeared first on Mogura VR.

entries.description: Production of the third season of the TV anime "Ranma 1/2" has been decided. Production of the third season of the TV anime "Ranma 1/2" has been decided and will start in October 2026 on Nippon Television Network Corporation (NTV). The series will be broadcast nationwide on NTV and will be distributed exclusively on Netflix immediately after the broadcast. The third season of the series will be broadcast on Nippon Television Network Corporation (NTV) beginning in October 2026.

entries.title: Bandai Conducts "Survey on Random Goods" - Some people on social networking sites are dissatisfied with the survey results.

entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS conducted the third "BANDAI SPIRITS Adult Survey on Random Goods" targeting 1,032 men and women aged 18-59 on the theme of products sold in random formats, which have been growing in popularity in recent years. The results of this survey have been met with dissatisfaction on social networking sites.

entries.title: Live-action "City Hunter" sequel to be produced and distributed exclusively on Netflix worldwide in 27 years! Original story by Tsukasa Hojo: "The way Ryohei-san's body is squeezed is tremendous..."

entries.description: It was announced that the Netflix movie "City Hunter 2" will be produced and distributed exclusively worldwide in 2027, and comments from the staff, including lead actor Ryohei Suzuki, have arrived with delight.

entries.title: The last episode of the series was very moving and the fans cried a lot! Reactions to the decision to produce the fourth season [Episode 11: Summary of Reactions with Spoilers].

entries.title: Produced by Dogakobo! Original TV Animation "Mobius Dust" to be broadcast in 2026, the third grand prize winner of "Project ANIMA".

Based on the original idea that won the grand prize in the "Kids Game Anime" category of the third edition of "Project ANIMA," the work will be directed by Taro Iwasaki and the series composition will be by Yoriko Tomita. Along with the announcement, a teaser visual and a teaser PV were also released.

The director of the film has also sent us his comments on the film.

The refurbished and strengthened fearless form is faithfully reproduced! #Tamiya #Plastic model

The May 2026 issue of "Gundam Ace" goes on sale on Thursday, March 26! In-depth special issue on "Mobile Suit Gundam: Senko no Hathaway Kilkee no Majo" to commemorate the blockbuster movie hit! Interview with Kensho Ono and more!
 #Senko no Hathaway #The Witch of Kirkee

entries.title: First anniversary of the broadcast of the anime "The Summer the Light Died" is being commemorated with the first music event of the work to be held in July.
entries.title_ja: アニメ「光が死んだ夏」放送1周年記念企画が始動　7月に作品初の音楽イベント開催
entries.description: A project to commemorate the first anniversary of the broadcast of the TV anime "The Summer the Light Died," written by Mokumoku Ren, has begun. As part of the project, the first music event "TV anime "The Summer the Light Died" - Thanksgiving Festival for the 1st Anniversary Spun with Sound and Image" will be held on July 5 at the Bunkyo Civic Hall in Tokyo.

entries.title: Kenichi, the Strongest Disciple of All Time 2" starts at Sunday Ueburu! A story was published in Sunday!

entries.title: Matsuken Samba" is now an anime! Matsuken Anime" will be distributed on YouTube in the summer, and the video will be shown at AJ.

entries.description: A new YouTube animation project, Matsuken Anime, based on Ken Matsudaira's song "Matsuken Samba," has been announced. Distribution is scheduled to begin in the summer of 2026.

entries.title: TV anime "Firefly's Bride" - Lynn plays Satoko, Koki Uchiyama plays Shinpei

entries.description: Lynn plays the role of Satoko and Koki Uchiyama plays the role of Shinpei in the TV anime "Firefly Bride" written by Oreco Tachibana. The second teaser visual and teaser PV have been released.

entries.title: New PV of the anime "Kill Ao" shows the dangerous school life, and visuals of Jyuusan holding a textbook and gun.

entries.title: Idolatry": Win the Saba competition to debut your beloved idol! A brain-driven idol manga depicting the ultimate "guessing game"!
entries.title_ja: 「アイドラトリィ」サバ番を勝ち抜いて最愛の推しをデビューさせる！究極の“推し活”を描く頭脳型アイドルマンガ
entries.description: Cyanna Yomi is an idol geek whose life's purpose is to promote her beloved guess, Fuwari Tsukishiro. One day, the idol group that she belongs to suddenly breaks up. In her disappointment, she learns that Fuwari is going to try out for an idol audition program, and decides to enter the audition herself in order to lead her to the top. Idolatry" is serialized in Magazine Pocket.

entries.title: A story of the strongest sword saint reincarnated as a beautiful girl maid who protects a young lady by replacing her sword with a broom, volume 1.
entries.title_ja: 剣を箒に持ち替えてお嬢様を守る、美少女メイドに転生した最強剣聖の物語1巻
entries.description: Nomura Eiji's "The Strongest Sword Saint, Reincarnated as a Bishojo Maid and Warriors on a Broom" volume 1 was released today, March 25, by Overlap's Garde Comics. It is a comic adaptation based on a novel by Mikazuki Neko.

entries.title: Buddy mystery "PAX: National Happiness Management Bureau" set in the near future Japan where "happiness" is quantified.

The first part was shown in the May issue of Monthly Comic Zenon (CoreMix), on sale today, March 25, and the second part will appear in the June issue of the same magazine, on sale April 24.

entries.title: A woman who is the exact duplicate of his dead best friend, and his life is turned upside down. A new suspense series where love, hate, and jealousy intersect.

entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will begin accepting pre-orders for the "METAL BUILD Nirvash type ZERO RS" on March 26 at 16:00 on Soul Web Store within Premium Bandai. The product will be shipped in August and is priced at 39,600 yen.

entries.title: Sales page for the second order of "Flashlight Hathaway: The Witch of Kilkee" Gundam Model Kits "HG Aluseus" and other models is now available on Amazon! HG Messer M01 Type" is open for reservation now!

entries.title: The Knight of Gold" from "Five Star Stories" will be released in August as a 1/144 scale plastic model with a fixed pose.

entries.title: Ichiban Kuji Lottery "Blue Archive vol.3" lineup revealed, on sale in stores from April 25.
entries.title_ja: 「一番くじ ブルーアーカイブ vol.3」全ラインナップが公開。4月25日から店頭販売開始
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will release "Ichiban Kuji Lottery Blue Archive vol. 3" in stores on April 25 and online on April 27 at 5 pm. The price is 770 yen per ticket. The full lineup has now been released.

entries.title: Five Kotobukiya Bishojo Plastic Models Included! Bishojo Plastic Model Goodie Box 2026 Spring" lottery sale at Kotobukiya Online Shop includes over 39,700 yen worth of items!
entries.title_ja: コトブキヤ製美少女プラモが5点封入！ コトブキヤオンラインショップにて「美少女プラモデル福箱 2026春」抽選販売実施合計39,700円相当以上が封入
entries.description: Kotobukiya is conducting a lottery for the "Bishojo Plastic Model Fukubako (Bishojo Plastic Model Goodie Box) 2026 Spring". The lottery will be held until 23:59 on April 8. The winner will be announced after the evening of April 9. The price is 19,800 yen.

entries.title: The Boss" from "METAL GEAR SOLID Δ: SNAKE EATER" has been sculpted by Revoltech Amazing Yamaguchi. Pre-order start soon!
entries.title_ja: 「METAL GEAR SOLID Δ: SNAKE EATER」より「ザ・ボス」がリボルテック アメイジング・ヤマグチで立体化。近日予約開始

entries.title: New "Transformers" product silhouettes unveiled. New Legends", "Studio Series" and more!

entries.description: The Gundam Model Kits "HG 1/144 Messer F01 Type" is back on sale at Amazon.

entries.title: Commemorating the 25th anniversary of "DUEL MASTERS," new products including "Gyakufuda Hen Vol. 1: Gyakufuda God vs. Kirifuda Ryu" are released.
entries.title_ja: 「デュエル・マスターズ」25周年を記念して「逆札篇 第1弾 逆転神VS切札竜」など新商品を発売
entries.description: TOMY will release "DM26-SD1 Doki-Doki Tsuyoyo Deck: 25 Royal Roads" on April 4 and "DM26-RP1 Gyakusatsuhen Vol. 1: Gyakusatsujin VS Kirifuda Ryu" on April 11 as a 25th anniversary measure for the TCG "Duel Masters. The "25 Royal Roads" will be priced at 1,100 yen, and the "Gyakufuda Arc Vol. 1" will be priced at 200 yen per pack.

entries.title: Lunamaria Hawk" prize figure from "Mobile Suit Gundam SEED FREEDOM" will begin rolling out on April 21.

entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will roll out the "Mobile Suit Gundam SEED FREEDOM" GLITTER&GLAMOURS-Lunamaria Hawke- Racing ver. prize figure from Banpresto on April 21.

entries.title: Liza's Nudo doll stopper figure from "Liza's Atelier: The Queen of Ever-darkness and the Secret Hideout" will be available from the fourth week of March!

entries.description: FLEW will begin rolling out the prize "KT model+ x Nudoru Stopper Figure Lizarin Stouteau" sequentially from the fourth week of March.

entries.description: Hobby Japan will release the magazine "Monthly Hobby Japan May 2026" today, March 25. The price is 1,760 yen.

entries.title: Our Treasure ends orders for the plastic model "Teiki Magna Palace The Night of Gold" at the manufacturer's direct sales outlets and encourages reservations through mail-order sites.
entries.title_ja: アワートレジャー、プラモデル「帝騎マグナパレス ザ・ナイト・オブ・ゴールド」のメーカー直販店での受注終了ほか通販サイトでの予約を促す
entries.description: Our Treasure announced that the plastic model "Teiki Magna Palace The Night of Gold" is no longer available for order through the manufacturer's direct sales outlet, Our Treasure Yahoo!

entries.title: SEGA PRIZES exhibits new prize figures such as "Jyujutsu Kaisen" and "Shiketsu Kaiyou" from the TV anime "Jyujutsu Kaisen" [#PrizeFair].
entries.title_ja: セガプライズ、TVアニメ『呪術廻戦』「死滅回游」など新作プライズフィギュアが展示【#プライズフェア】
entries.description: Sega Fave unveiled new prize figures at the 83rd Prize Fair on February 26.

entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will release the character lottery "Ichiban Kuji Lottery: Hoshi no Kirby PUPUPU GOURMET" sequentially from May 9. The price will be 750 yen per raffle ticket.

entries.title: New series "Cats and the Literary Guru" depicts the casual days of a novelist and a cat who aspires to be a literary legend.
entries.title_ja: 文豪を目指す小説家と猫の何気ない日々を描く新連載「猫と文豪」
entries.description: A new serial by Isami Nakagawa, "Cats and Bungo," started in today's March 25 issue of Big Comic No. 7 (Shogakukan).

entries.title: Ami Koshimizu plays Haru in the second season of "Doro Hedoro"; the first season will be available for free on YouTube starting today.
entries.title_ja: 「ドロヘドロ」2期に小清水亜美がハル役で出演、1期は今日から順次YouTube無料配信
entries.description: It has been announced that Ami Koshimizu will play the role of Haru in the anime "Dorohedoro Season 2" written by Ball Hayashida.

entries.title: The anime "Vs. will air in July! Elementary school gamer Arisa Fujimiya is played by Maria Naganawa
entries.title_ja: アニメ「対ありでした。」は7月放送！小学生ゲーマー・藤宮亜里沙役は長縄まりあ
entries.description: The TV anime by Eri Eshima, "Vs. ～The young lady doesn't play fighting games" will be aired in July. The key visual and new cast information have been released.

entries.title: The story of a very strong but zero-communicative otaku girl who unwillingly became a buzzkill and delivered a dungeon.
entries.title_ja: 不本意にバズってしまった、超強いけどコミュ力0なオタク少女のダンジョン配信物語
entries.description: Green "[Sad news] Otaku girl with zero comic power, sinks a dragon with one punch and helps a famous distributor, and the unwilling buzz doesn't stop" volume 1 was released today, March 25, by Nova Comics of Ichijisan Shobo. It is a comic adaptation based on a novel by Otokyu Fried Rice.

entries.title: SEGA NET MAHJONG MJ" Enables Linkage with SEGA Account
entries.title_ja: 「セガNET麻雀 MJ」，SEGA Accountとの連携が可能に
entries.description: [未翻訳]

entries.title: ［Play Report] Up to 4 Players Compete in a Heated Game! Sanrio Characters Smash Festa! is a new type of sports game with simple controls and fun strategy!
entries.title_ja: ［プレイレポ］白熱の最大4人対戦！ 「サンリオキャラクターズ スマッシュフェスタ！」はシンプル操作と戦略が楽しい新感覚スポーツゲーム
entries.description: Up to 4 players can enjoy heated battles in the "Sanrio Characters Smash Festa! where up to four players can enjoy heated battles!　The simple controls make it easy for anyone to play, while the gimmicks and power gauges provide a strategic element. We report on the appeal of this new type of sports game.

entries.title: NGS ver. 2", AC Scratch "Quaint Ensemble '26" including kimono and dresses
entries.title_ja: 「NGS ver.2」，和装やドレスを含むACスクラッチ「クウェイントアンサンブル'26」が登場
entries.description: [未翻訳]

entries.title: Destiny 2's annual limited-time "Guardian Games" event. Limited items are also available in the "Magic: The Gathering" collaboration.
entries.title_ja: 「Destiny 2」恒例の期間限定イベント「ガーディアン・ゲーム」を開催。「マジック：ザ・ギャザリング」コラボで限定アイテムも登場
entries.description: Bungie today launched its annual limited-time "Guardian Games" event in the online action RPG "Destiny 2. This year's event is also a collaboration with "Magic: The Gathering," with armor decorations and various cosmetic items themed on the world of the game.

entries.title: Open World RPG "Wartales" Announces Second Large Expansion Pack "Fires in the Capital". Adds capital city Isandrine, new class "Arsonist" and more.
entries.title_ja: オープンワールドRPG「Wartales」，大型拡張パック第2弾「Fires in the Capital」を発表。首都イサンドリンや新クラス「放火魔」などを追加
entries.description: ShiroGames has announced that the second major expansion pack for its open-world RPG Wartales, FiresintheCapital, will be released during April 2026. The new capital city of Isandrine will be added to the game, and will involve various political forces in the city, including the Teaching Sacred Order and the Rebel Army. In addition, a new class, the Arsonist, will be added, centered on the use of fire.

entries.title: Console Archives Terra Cresta, a vertical scrolling STG released by Nichibutsu in 1986 for 8-bit home video game consoles, will be distributed on March 26.
entries.title_ja: 「コンソールアーカイブス テラクレスタ」，3月26日配信。1986年にニチブツから8ビット家庭用ゲーム機向けに発売された縦スクロールSTG
entries.description: Hamster announced today that it will begin distributing "Console Archive Terra Cresta" on March 26. Terra Cresta" is a vertical scrolling STG released by Nichibutsu in 1986 for 8-bit home video game consoles. The player's ship can combine with allied parts to make formation attacks, and the formation can be switched depending on the combination.

entries.title: Sakatsukuru RTW", Dani Olmo and other Spanish superstars join the ranks as new ★5 players with possession as their specialty tactic.
entries.title_ja: 「サカつくRTW」，ダニ・オルモらスペインのスーパースターが得意戦術ポゼッションの新★5選手として参戦
entries.description: [未翻訳]

entries.title: An analog record box containing 64 songs from "Chrono Trigger" is released today. A code to obtain the songs in MP3 format is also included.
entries.title_ja: 「クロノ・トリガー」を彩る64曲を収録したアナログレコードBOXが本日発売。楽曲をMP3形式で入手できるコードも封入
entries.description: Square Enix released today (March 25, 2026) the music product "ChronoTriggerOriginalSoundtrackVinylLPBox". This product is a 4-LP box set containing 64 original soundtracks from the company's RPG "Chrono Trigger".

entries.title: Tomodachi Collection: Wakuwaku Seikatsu", a trial version of the game, was released today as a surprise. Become the caretaker of a small island and watch over the lives of up to three "Mii" characters.
entries.title_ja: 「トモダチコレクション わくわく生活」，体験版を本日サプライズ配信。小さな島の管理人となり，最大3人までの「Mii」たちの生活を見守れる
entries.description: Nintendo today (March 25, 2026) began distributing a demo version of "Tomodachi Collection Wakuwaku Seikatsu" for NintendoSwitch, which the company plans to release on April 16. The demo version allows users to create up to three Mii and see how they live their lives on a small island.

entries.title: Ultra Monster Zetton's Home Run Derby Game "Zetton's 1 Trillion Degree Home Run Competition" Now Open to the Public. Playable for free from your browser.
entries.title_ja: ウルトラ怪獣・ゼットンのホームランダービーゲーム「ゼットンの1兆度ホームラン競争」が公開に。ブラウザから無料プレイ可能
entries.description: Tsuburaya Productions today (March 25, 2026) released the baseball game "Zetton's 1 Trillion Degree Home Run Race". The game can be played for free from a browser. This is a so-called "home run derby" game in which players try to hit back the trillion-degree fireballs thrown by the Ultra monster Zetton.

entries.title: NGS ver.2" and the official web manga "Sentral! released its fourth volume of the official web manga "Sentral!
entries.title_ja: 「NGS ver.2」，公式WEBマンガ「せんとらるっ！」の単行本4巻を発売
entries.description: [未翻訳]

entries.title: Urban Legend Dismantling Center" and illustration goods by Bukubu Okawa are now available. Pre-orders are now being accepted at the mail order site "empty.tokyo" and other sites.
entries.title_ja: 「都市伝説解体センター」，大川ぶくぶ氏による描き起こしイラストグッズが登場。通販サイト「empty.tokyo」などで予約受付を開始
entries.description: empty announced today the release of "Urban Legend Dismantling Center" goods featuring illustrations drawn by manga artist Bukubu Okawa, and began accepting reservations at the mail order site empty.tokyo and other sites. Some stores of Amiami and Kotobukiya are planning to start pre-sales from April 28th, and will also offer purchase benefits.

entries.title: Report on "18TRIP" live event "HAMA Tours presents "Omotenashi Live" -Sparkle-" #01. From duo songs to new songs, the audience was captivated all night long!
entries.title_ja: 「18TRIP」ライブイベント「HAMAツアーズpresents “おもてなしライブ” -Sparkle-」♯01レポート。デュオ曲から新曲まで，観客を魅了した一夜
entries.description: On February 21, 2026, "18TRIP" held its first live event "HAMA Tours presents 'Omotenashi Live' -Sparkle-" #01 at Pacifico Yokohama in Kanagawa. The following is a report on the night when the audience was excited by the "Omotenashi Duo Song" and the first performance of a new song.

entries.title: Buying and selling antiques and tarot readings will determine management. Fortune Seller, a roguelike strategy, launches April 6, 2026.
entries.title_ja: 骨董品の売買とタロット占いが経営を左右する。ローグライクストラテジー「Fortune Seller」，2026年4月6日に発売
entries.description: Indie development studio Kiwick has announced that its new roguelike strategy "FortuneSeller" will be released on April 6, 2026. The theme of the game is the management of an antique store, combining the buying and selling of antiques and the effects of tarot cards to create synergy. The game also supports Japanese-language display.

entries.title: Collaboration event between "Atsumare Animal Crossing" and "Tokyu Resort Town Tateshina" will be held from April 18 to July 20. Let's enjoy fishing for salmon, DIY, etc.!
entries.title_ja: 「あつまれ どうぶつの森」×「東急リゾートタウン蓼科」コラボイベント，4月18日〜7月20日に開催。サカナ釣りやDIYなどを楽しもう
entries.description: Tokyu Land Corporation and Tokyu Resorts & Stay today announced that they will hold a collaborative event with "Atsumare Animal's Forest" entitled "Atsumare Animal's Forest x Tokyu Resort Town Tateshina Nature Tour: Tateshina Forest" from April 18 to July 20. This event is open not only to overnight guests but also to day visitors.

entries.title: Smoke," the first full-color manga by Korehito Okure, will be released in Japanese on May 15.
entries.title_ja: 大暮維人初のフルカラーマンガ「Smoke」、日本語版が5月15日に発売
entries.description: The Japanese edition of "Smoke," Korehito Ohgure's first full-color manga, will be released on May 15.

entries.title: First Trooper Appears in Episode 12 of "Armor Shinden Samurai Trooper" Special PV for 2nd Cool
entries.title_ja: 「鎧真伝サムライトルーパー」第12話に初代トルーパー登場　第2クールの特報PV公開
entries.description: The first Samurai Trooper appeared in the final twelfth episode of the first season of the TV anime "Armor Shinden Samurai Trooper. In addition, it has been decided that the second cool will start airing and distribution in July. A special PV was released.

entries.title: Second season of "Mayonaka Heart Tune" production decided, cast comment video released, video of insert song also released.
entries.title_ja: 「真夜中ハートチューン」2期制作決定、キャストのコメント動画公開　挿入歌の映像も
entries.description: The second season of the TV anime "Midnight Heart Tune" written by Masakuni Igarashi will be produced. A comment video from the five main cast members has been released.

entries.title: First PV of "Tentaku no Jardugaru" featuring the voices of Akiyoshi Sekine, Noriko Kuwashima, Jun Saito, and others.
entries.title_ja: 「天幕のジャードゥーガル」に関根明良、桑島法子、齋藤潤ら　ボイス収めた第1弾PV
entries.description: Akiyoshi Sekine, Noriko Kuwashima, Jun Saito, Arata Suzuki and Miyu Irino have been cast in the TV anime "Tentaku no Jardugaru" based on the Tomato Soup original story. The first PV with character voices and "character art" have also been released.

entries.title: Part II of "Chainsaw Man" is complete; final 24 volumes to be released June 4.
entries.title_ja: 「チェンソーマン」第二部完結、最終24巻は6月4日発売
entries.description: The second part of Tatsuki Fujimoto's "Censorman" reached its final episode in episode 232, distributed today, March 25, on Shonen Jump +.

entries.title: [March 25, 2026] List of Manga Books Released Today
entries.title_ja: 【2026年3月25日】本日発売のマンガ単行本リスト
entries.description: Comic Natalie is pleased to announce today's March 25, 2026 book release. Click here to see the list of magazines on sale today.

entries.title_ja: 明日3月25日（水）発売分のマンガ雑誌リスト
entries.description: Comic Natalie is pleased to announce that a manga magazine will be released tomorrow, Wednesday, March 25.

entries.title: What is going to happen to the cohabitation life of a philosophy graduate student and a painter... "Tonari no Kimi wa Ai ni Mattekitakatta" vol. 1
entries.title_ja: 哲学科の院生×画家の同居生活の行方は…「となりの君は、愛ばっか考えてる」1巻
entries.description: Kotoha Nakano's "Tonari no Kimi wa Ai ni Mattekimasu" (My Neighbor, All I Think About Is Love) volume 1 was released today, March 24.

entries.title: Saran Wrap of different generations lined up! Gacha "Saran Wrap Reki-Daikei Package Key Chain" to be released in early April
entries.title_ja: 異なる世代の「サランラップ」がラインナップ！ ガチャ「サランラップ 歴代パッケージキーチェーン」4月上旬発売
entries.description: Takara Tomy Arts will release a gacha product, "Saran Wrap Rekiyo Package Key Chain," in early April. The price is 300 yen per piece.

entries.title: PUNI☆MOFU Ginran" in Silver Wolf coloring released today from Megami Devices
entries.title_ja: メガミデバイスよりシルバーウルフカラーリングの「PUNI☆MOFU 銀ラン」本日発売
entries.description: Kotobukiya will release a plastic model "PUNI☆MOFU Ginran" on March 25. The price is 6,930 yen.

entries.title: BUSTER DOLL Night Alice with Honda AB12 Moto Compo" released today from Megami Devices
entries.title_ja: メガミデバイスより「BUSTER DOLL ナイト Alice with Honda AB12 モトコンポ」本日発売
entries.description: Kotobukiya will release a plastic model "BUSTER DOLL Knight Alice with Honda AB12 Moto Compo" on March 25. The price is 6,380 yen.

entries.title: Plastic model "Nujadell Gar (The Movie Version)" from "The Super Dimension Fortress Macross: Ai oboete desu ka" (The Super Dimension Fortress Macross: Ai oboete desu ka) starts shipping today!
entries.title_ja: 劇場版「超時空要塞マクロス 愛・おぼえていますか」よりプラモデル「ヌージャデル・ガー （劇場版）」が本日出荷開始
entries.description: Hasegawa will start shipping the plastic model "Nujadell Gar (Theater Version)" on March 25. The price is 6,380 yen.

entries.title: Amazon Sale] Save on Easy-to-operate, Authentic Children's Drones!　LED and camera-equipped models are also lined up!
entries.title_ja: 【Amazonセール】簡単操作で本格的な子ども向けドローンがお買い得！　LEDやカメラ搭載モデルもラインナップ
entries.description: Various drones are on sale at Amazon at special prices. The period is until March 29, 23:59.

entries.title: Amazon Sale] DJI offers great deals on a variety of drones!　Mini 4 Pro", "Avata 2", "Flip", and "Neo" are lined up!
entries.title_ja: 【Amazonセール】DJIのドローン各種がお買い得！　「Mini 4 Pro」、「Avata 2」、「Flip」、「Neo」がラインナップ
entries.description: DJI drones are on sale at Amazon at a special price. The period is until April 7, 23:59.

entries.title: Marathon Releases "Thief Shell" Cinematic Video. A highly mobile shell that makes full use of drones.
entries.title_ja: 「Marathon」，「Thief Shell」シネマティック映像を公開。ドローンを駆使する機動力の高いシェル
entries.description: Bungie today (March 24, 2026) released the "ThiefShell" cinematic video for its PvPvE survival escape FPS game, Marathon. In the video, Thief can be seen luring out enemies by drone and readying his gun.

entries.title: Harvest Skies: Crop Dusting Simulator," a pesticide spraying flight sim that allows up to five players to cooperate, has released an announcement trailer.
entries.title_ja: 最大5人で協力可能な“農薬散布”フライトシム「Harvest Skies: Crop Dusting Simulator」，アナウンストレイラーを公開
entries.description: DigitalChiefsStudio today (March 24, 2026) announced a new title in development, HarvestSkies:CropDustingSimulator, and released an announcement trailer. The title is a flight simulation game in which players take on the business of spraying pesticides with agricultural aircraft.

entries.title: Information on "Dragon Quest" 40th Anniversary Commemorative Merchandise Released. Slime plush toys, figures in a special "antique gold" color, etc.
entries.title_ja: 「ドラゴンクエスト」40周年記念グッズの情報を公開。スライムのぬいぐるみや，特別なカラー「アンティークゴールド」のフィギュアなど
entries.description: Square Enix today released information on the "Dragon Quest" 40th anniversary commemorative goods that will be available at the Square Enix e-STORE on July 17. The items include "Smile Slime Plushie Slime" and "Dragon Quest Metallic Monsters Gallery.

entries.title: Boomer shooter "Starship Troopers: Ultimate Bug War!" that shows love for the original film (Almost a Day Indie Pick Up!)
entries.title_ja: 原作映画への愛を感じるブーマーシューター「Starship Troopers: Ultimate Bug War!」（ほぼ日 インディーPick Up！）
entries.description: Today's "Almost Daily Indie PickUp!" introduces "StarshipTroopers:UltimateBugWar!", a boomer shooter in which players shoot hordes of bugs in the world of the movie "Starship Troopers". Players take on the role of Sammy, a soldier of the Mobile Infantry, as he goes on a bug sweep across the galaxy with the full throttle of Federation propaganda.

entries.title: NIKKE: Goddess of Victory" collaborates with Razer. Viper's limited edition costume is now available. Limited quantity boxes will be available on March 30.

Fuji), in which the ukiyoe artist Katsushika Hokusai depicted a magnificent view of Mt. In conjunction with the release of the book, original reproductions and T-shirts will also be on sale.

The game is scheduled to be released in 2026. This 3D action game allows players to relive many famous scenes from "Mobile Police Patlabor".

entries.title: NTT DOCOMO releases "Influencer Nurturing Game Bakumore," a free browser game to learn about the risk of information leakage on SNS. Also provides educational materials for use in educational settings.

entries.description: NTT DOCOMO today released a free browser game "Influencer Nurturing Game Bakumore" on its official website. The game is a simulation game in which you, as a high school girl dreaming of becoming an influencer, increase your followers by posting on SNS. The game has educational and horror elements, and allows players to learn about the risks of leaking personal information that lurk in the photos they post.

entries.title: A true "God game. I Am Jesus Christ," an action-adventure game depicting the events from the birth to the resurrection of Jesus Christ, will be released on Steam on April 2.

entries.title: In a world where the dead become monsters, two young girls embark on a journey of redemption.
entries.title_ja: 「死神聖女」1巻　死者が化け物になる世界で、2人の少女が歩む救済旅
entries.description: The first volume of Masayuki Shizaki's "The Reaper Saint," written by Yui Aito, was released today, March 23.

entries.title: Haruka Shiraishi & Yoshi Inagaki to appear in "Demon's Crest," anime produced by Production I.G.
entries.title_ja: 「デモンズ・クレスト」に白石晴香＆稲垣好が出演、アニメ制作はProduction I.G
entries.description: The anime "Demon's Crest" will be adapted into an anime in 2026. The teaser PV and teaser visual of the anime have been unveiled, and it has been revealed that Haruka Shiraishi will play the role of the main character, Yuma Ashihara, and his twin sister, Saba Ashihara, will be played by Yoshimi Inagaki. Production I.G will produce the animation.

entries.title: Anime "Charisma" to air in January 2027; visuals of Charisma and her friends huddled together revealed
entries.title_ja: アニメ「カリスマ」は2027年1月から放送、カリスマたちが身を寄せ合うビジュアル公開
entries.description: The TV anime "Charisma" will be broadcast nationwide on TBS from January 2027. In addition, a teaser visual and its unveiling video were also released.

entries.title: Inori Minase appears in "Chibi Godzilla Strikes Back." New theme song is a new song written by OKAMOTO'S.
entries.title_ja: 「ちびゴジラの逆襲」に水瀬いのり出演　新しい主題歌はOKAMOTO'S書き下ろしの新曲
entries.description: Inori Minase will appear as Chibi Batra in the TV anime "Chibi Godzilla Strikes Back," which will be on-air from April onward, and a trailer and new visuals have also been released.

entries.title: Anime "The King of Robbers," Miyu Irino as the future "King of Deceit" and Nobuhiko Okamoto as a hired thug.
entries.title_ja: アニメ「盗掘王」、未来の“詐欺王”役に入野自由、雇われチンピラ役に岡本信彦
entries.description: SAN.G, Yuns (REDICE STUDIO), and 3B2S announced that Miyu Irino and Nobuhiko Okamoto have been added to the cast of the TV anime "The King of Stealing," based on the original story by 3B2S. In addition, the first main visual, character visuals, and character introduction PV were released.

entries.title: Erina Iwata, a guest on the first episode of "Snowball Earth," predicts glacial-weather conditions.
entries.title_ja: 「スノウボールアース」岩田絵里奈アナによる氷河期風天気予報　第1話にもゲスト出演
entries.description: A video titled "Ice Age Wind Weather Forecast" from the TV anime "Snowball Earth," written by Yuhiro Tsujijiji, has been released.

entries.title: Dorikomi's new web manga site, Dorikomi+, will launch in late April, introducing new serials in advance.
entries.title_ja: ドリコムの新Webマンガサイト・ドリコミ＋が4月下旬に開設、新連載を先行で紹介
entries.description: Dorikom is opening a new Web manga site, Dorikomi+, in late April. A teaser site was opened today, March 23, and part of the new serial lineup was previewed.

entries.title: Once a legend, now a scum: "Nighthawk Again," vol. 1, about a former assassin who is both a smoker and a drinker.
entries.title_ja: かつては伝説、今はカス　ヤニカス＆酒カスの元殺し屋を描く「夜鷹ふたたび」1巻
entries.description: Izumida Fuyuki's "Nighthawk Again" volume 1 was released today, March 23.

entries.title: The prince of a very peaceful country loves depressing developments "Depression-loving protagonist vs. kind world" new serial
entries.title_ja: 超平和な国の王子は、鬱展開が大好き「鬱展開大好き主人公VS優しい世界」新連載
entries.description: Makoto Mashima's new serial, "Depression-loving protagonist vs. kind world: Reincarnation is too peaceful, so I set out on a journey in search of supreme despair," has begun in Overlap's Comicgarde. It is a comic adaptation based on a novel by Ishibi Ishi.

entries.title: Figure "Itsusen Shinkubu Mothbrow Ver." from "Azur Lane" to be released in November.
entries.title_ja: 「アズールレーン」よりフィギュア「逸仙 しん首蛾眉Ver.」が11月に発売
entries.description: Overseas manufacturer APEX-TOYS will release the figure "Itsusen Shinkubu Mothbrow Ver." in November. The price is 27,060 yen.

entries.title: Storm Spriggan from "Beyblade Burst" is now available in Beyblade X Ver. on March 28.
entries.title_ja: 「ベイブレード バースト」のストームスプリガンがベイブレードエックスVer.になって登場。3月28日に発売
entries.description: TOMY will release the "BEYBLADE X BX-00 Starter Storm Spriggan 2-70M" toy on March 28. The price is 2,300 yen.

entries.title: Rui Saotome [Momozakura High School, Swimsuit]" from "Sosai Shoujo Teien" is open for reservation on March 24th; also pre-order Dreaming Style White Dolphin
entries.title_ja: 「創彩少女庭園」より「早乙女 瑠衣【桃桜高校・競泳水着】」が3月24日に予約開始ドリーミングスタイル ホワイトドルフィンも同時予約
entries.description: Kotobukiya will start accepting reservations for plastic models "Rui Saotome [Momozakura High School, Swimsuit]" and "Rui Saotome [Momozakura High School, Swimsuit] Dreaming Style White Dolphin" from March 24, 11:00.

entries.title: HG 1/144 Aluseus" to be released on April 25; BANDAI SPIRITS' plastic model schedule for April release revealed
entries.title_ja: 「HG 1/144 アリュゼウス」が4月25日に発売決定。BANDAI SPIRITSの4月発売プラモデルスケジュールが公開
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS released the plastic model release schedule for April.

entries.title: Vocaloid elementary school student "Yuki Utaiai" is sculpted as a figure in the song "Strong Wind All Back" by Yucopi.
entries.title_ja: ボカロ小学生「歌愛ユキ」がゆこぴ氏の楽曲「強風オールバック」の姿でフィギュア化
entries.description: Alice Glint will release the figure "Yuki 'Uta Ai Yuki' Strong Wind All Back Ver." in February 2027. The price is 8,140 yen for the standard edition and 8,690 yen for the Amiami limited edition.

entries.title: S.H.Figuarts Gabin Luminous" from "Super Space Cop Gabin Infinity" to be released as a product.
entries.title_ja: 「超宇宙刑事ギャバンインフィニティ」より「S.H.Figuarts ギャバン・ルミナス」が商品化決定
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS announced the commercialization of the S.H.Figuarts Gabin Luminous action figure.

entries.title: Capcom releases "Nemesis" 1/6 scale figure from "Resident Evil RE:3" in December. The pedestal is a transport chassis design.
entries.title_ja: カプコンから「バイオハザード RE:3」より「ネメシス」1/6スケールフィギュアが12月発売。台座は輸送筐体デザイン
entries.description: Capcom will release a 1/6 scale figure "Capcom Figure Builder Creator's Model Nemesis" on December 10. The price is 49,478 yen.

entries.title: Zoids] Action Plastic Model "RMZ-021 Shield Liger Mark II" is open for reservation in April.
entries.title_ja: 【ゾイド】アクションプラモデル「RMZ-021 シールドライガー・マークII」が4月に予約開始
entries.description: T-SPARK, Takara Tomy's hobby label for high-target customers, will begin accepting reservations for the action plastic model "RMZ-021 Shield Liger Mark II" in April.

entries.title: Tobika Osaki from "THE iDOLM@STER SHINY COLORS" to be released in January 2027 as a figure wearing "Gardien Amethyst" costume.
entries.title_ja: 「アイドルマスター シャイニーカラーズ」より大崎甜花が“ガルディエーヌアメジスト”衣装姿でフィギュア化。2027年1月に発売
entries.description: Union Creative will release the figure "Osaki Taika Gardienne Amethyst ver." in January 2027. The price is 33,000 yen.

entries.title: Hobby Japan Vintage Vol. 14" goes on sale March 23. Verified the kit of "Space Battleship Yamato" Bandai model at that time.
entries.title_ja: 「ホビージャパン ヴィンテージ Vol.14」3月23日発売。「宇宙戦艦ヤマト」バンダイ模型当時のキットを検証
entries.description: Hobby Japan released "Hobby Japan Vintage Vol. 14" on March 23. The price is 2,640 yen.

entries.title: Aoshima to release plastic model "1/24 Wild Speed JZA80 Supra" in August.
entries.title_ja: アオシマ、プラモデル「1/24 ワイルド・スピード JZA80 スープラ」を8月に発売
entries.description: Aoshima Bunka Kyozai will release a plastic model "1/24 Wild Speed JZA80 Supra" in August. The price is 4,840 yen, and reservations will be accepted from 14:00 on March 30.

entries.title: Big size SUGOI swimsuit figure! Hana Uzaki and Tsuki Uzaki from "Uzaki-chan Wanna Play!
entries.title_ja: ビッグサイズのSUGOI水着姿！ 「宇崎ちゃんは遊びたい！ω」より宇崎花＆宇崎月が新プライズフィギュアシリーズ「Eternal Romance」で立体化
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will release prize figures "Uzaki-chan Wanna Play! omega Eternal Romance Uzaki Hana Sweater Swimsuit ver." and "Uzaki-chan Wanna Play!

entries.title: 3COINS releases "Quick Shot Bow," a target shooting toy, today, March 23. Shooting Toy with Target" using soft sponge bullets also released on the same day.
entries.title_ja: 3COINS、的当てトイ「クイックショットボウ」を本日3月23日に発売。柔らかいスポンジ弾を使用「ターゲット付きシューティングトイ」も同日発売
entries.description: PAL will release "Quick Shot Bow" on March 23 at the official mail order site of 3COINS, a general merchandise store operated by the company. The price is 1,650 yen. On the same day, "Shooting Toy with Target" will also go on sale. The price is 660 yen.

entries.title: Screamer, a battle racing game with anime-style graphics, launched today for advance access for pre-order purchasers.
entries.title_ja: アニメ風グラフィックスが特徴のバトルレースゲーム「Screamer」，予約購入者向けの先行アクセスを本日スタート
entries.description: Milestone today (March 23, 2026) released a launch trailer for "Screamer," which the company plans to release on March 26, 2026, with advance access for pre-order customers. In the trailer, you can see the characters and the intense racing scenes with the music of "Wagamama Rakia".

entries.title: 50% off "Metaphor: Refantaggio" and 60% off "Persona 3 Reloaded". Steam "Spring Sale" of Atlus titles is underway.
entries.title_ja: 「メタファー：リファンタジオ」が50％オフ，「ペルソナ3 リロード」が60％オフ。アトラスタイトルのSteam「Springセール」が開催中
entries.description: Atlus today (March 23, 2026) launched its Spring Sale for downloadable titles on Steam. During the Spring Sale, popular Atlus titles will be offered at heavily discounted prices, including a 50% discount on "Metaphor: Refantaggio".

entries.title: Iris Odyssey: Pandora's Girl" will be released on May 29. Fantasy ADV depicting the fateful encounter and adventures of a girl searching for her brother and a mage crime investigator.
entries.title_ja: 「アイリス・オデッセイ パンドラの少女」，5月29日に発売。兄を探す少女と魔導師犯罪捜査官の運命の出会いと冒険を描くファンタジーADV
entries.description: Ysnid announced today that Iris Odyssey Pandora's Girl will be released on Steam on May 29, 2026. This fantasy ADV depicts the fateful encounter and adventures of a girl, Fuka, who searches for her missing brother, and a mage crime investigator, Iris, in present-day Shibuya. An original ASMR drama will also be distributed on the same day.

entries.title: Xbox Play Anywhere Showcase report on ID@Xbox's hottest titles.
entries.title_ja: 「Spiritfarer」開発スタジオの新作「At Fate’s End」を初試遊。ID@Xbox注目作が集まったXbox Play Anywhere Showcaseレポート
entries.description: Report on the "XboxPlayAnywhereShowcase" held during the "GDCFestivalofGaming2026" in San Francisco, U.S.A. Let's take a look at the 13 exhibited titles, centering on the new "AtFate'sEnd" from ThunderLotusGames. ThunderLotusGames' new title "AtFate'sEnd" and 13 other exhibited titles.

entries.title: From game-related lectures to exhibits. Free event "OPEN GAME FEST 2026" will be held in Kyoto on July 11. Applications for indie/student works are now being accepted.
entries.title_ja: ゲーム関係の講演から作品の出展まで。無料イベント「OPEN GAME FEST 2026」，京都で7月11日開催。インディー/学生作品の応募も受付中
entries.description: Indie-usGames announced today (March 23, 2026) that it will hold OPENGAMEFEST2026, an offline event for all game developers, students who want to enter the game industry, and game fans, on July 11 in Kyoto.

entries.title: Marathon, the first end content zone, the Cryogenic Archive, is now available. Tense battles and desperate escapes await
entries.title_ja: 「Marathon」，初のエンドコンテンツゾーン「低温アーカイブ」が登場。緊迫感のある戦闘や一か八かの脱出が待ち受ける
entries.description: On March 20, 2026, Bungie unleashed its first end content zone, CryoArchive, in its PvPvE survival escape FPS, Marathon. Located on board the UESC Marathon, this zone awaits players for tense PvPvE combat, gear pursuit, and one-or-die escapes.

entries.title: DISSIDIA DUELM FINAL FANTASY" Advance Download Begins; Video Interviews with FF Series Creators Also Released
entries.title_ja: 「ディシディア デュエルム ファイナルファンタジー」，事前ダウンロードを開始。FFシリーズのクリエイター陣によるインタビュー映像も公開
entries.description: Square Enix today launched the smartphone game "Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy" for advance download. The service will begin on March 24. To commemorate the release of the game, a video interview with the creators of the previous titles has been released.

entries.title: BOATRACE FIGHTER," a collaboration project between "Street Fighter" and boat races, will be held. The first campaign has started.
entries.title_ja: 「ストリートファイター」×ボートレースのコラボ企画「BOATRACE FIGHTER」を開催。全9戦で展開，第1弾キャンペーンがスタート
entries.description: On March 20, 2026, the BOATRACE Promotion Association launched "BOATRACEFIGHTER," a collaboration project with the "Street Fighter" series. The event will be held nine times a year in conjunction with major races. In addition, a "Master-Disciple Match" event for "Street Fighter 6" is scheduled to be held on March 29.

entries.title: MACHINE CHILD," a girl-raising SLG by Asato Oyari, to be released on Steam on April 8
entries.title_ja: 大槍葦人氏による少女育成SLG「MACHINE CHILD（マシンチャイルド）」，Steam版を4月8日にリリース決定
entries.description: On March 21, 2026, Shoujo Knights announced the Steam version of "MACHINECHILD" for PC, currently available on DLsite, will be released on April 8 (Japan time). and other new features will be added to the Steam version.

entries.title: I-PRIVERSE", which is undergoing a major renewal of its live system, will go live on April 2, 2011. Team "Gallmageddon" from "Pripara" also makes an appearance.
entries.title_ja: ライブシステムを大幅にリニューアルする「アイプリバース」，おねがい1だんを4月2日に稼動。「プリパラ」のチーム「ガァルマゲドン」も登場
entries.description: Takara Tomy Arts announced today that the arcade game "I Preverse" will go live on April 2, 2026, with a please 1 dan. The live system will be significantly renewed, and the timing of when players can obtain codecs will also be changed. In addition, three members of the team "Gallmageddon" from "Pripara" will appear for the first time.

entries.title: 30 hours of "Persona 3" music streaming. No archive, one-night-only distribution event starts at 19:00 on March 27.
entries.title_ja: 「ペルソナ3」の楽曲を30時間連続配信。アーカイブなし，一夜限りの配信イベントを3月27日19：00にスタート
entries.description: Sega announced on March 23, 2026 that it will be offering "PersonaSoundStationVol.1:Persona3SeriesMusic30-hourLivestream" from March 27, 19:00 to 29, 1:00. This is an online event to enjoy Persona 3 music for 30 hours. No archived distribution is planned.

entries.title: Uma Musume Pretty Derby" new official program "Paka Live TV' #1" will be distributed on March 27, 20:00. A new corner introducing the racehorse that became the motif of the show will appear.
entries.title_ja: 「ウマ娘 プリティーダービー」新公式番組「ぱかライブTV' #1」 ，3月27日20：00に配信。モチーフとなった競走馬を紹介するコーナーが新登場
entries.description: Cygames announced today (March 23, 2026) that "Paka Live TV'#1," a new official program of the cross-media content "Uma Musume Pretty Derby," will be distributed on March 27, 20:00 on the official YouTube. In this program, the latest game information such as the next gacha update and story events will be shown.

entries.title: Align the marbles, erase them, and unleash your special moves! Now accepting crowdfunds for "Re;MATCH," a board game that combines falling puzzles and fighting games!
entries.title_ja: マーブルを揃えて消し，必殺技を放て！ 落ちものパズルと対戦格闘を組み合わせたボードゲーム「Re;MATCH」のクラファンを実施中
entries.description: A crowdfunding campaign is currently underway on Kickstarter for "Re;MATCH," a unique game that uses a fighting game motif and a console-like cabinet as the basis for a falling-puzzle battle. The game is based on a fighting game and uses a console-like cabinet.

entries.title: Kiln, a 4-on-4 online "pottery" battle game, will be released on April 23, with an open beta for the PC version scheduled to begin on April 9.
entries.title_ja: 4対4のオンライン“陶芸”バトルゲーム「Kiln」，4月23日に発売決定。4月9日からPC版のオープンβを開催予定
entries.description: XboxGameStudios announced that the release date for "Kiln," a new title in development by DoubleFine Productions, has been set for April 23. The game is an online multiplayer "pottery" battle game about creation and destruction, in which players build ceramic armor that changes in play style and abilities based on its shape.

entries.title: A live program to announce the first anniversary of "G-Genesis Eternal" will be distributed on March 24 at 20:00. Gauman Nobile distributed to commemorate the release of "Senko no Hathaway."
entries.title_ja: 「Gジェネ エターナル」1周年情報を発表する生番組を3月24日20：00に配信。「閃光のハサウェイ」公開記念でガウマン・ノビルを配布
entries.description: Namco Bandai Entertainment Inc. announced today that it will hold a "Roadmap Announcement Live Broadcast" at 20:00 on March 24th to release the latest information for the first anniversary of "SD Gundam Generation Eternal" service. In addition, new information on the campaign to commemorate the release of the movie "Senko no Hathaway" has also been released.

entries.title: Production of the second season of the anime "Hana Zakari no Kimitachi e" has been decided; Mizuki's school life enters its second year.
entries.title_ja: アニメ「花ざかりの君たちへ」第2期制作が決定、瑞稀の学園生活は2年目へ
entries.description: The second season of the TV anime "Hana Zakari no Kimitachi To" written by Hisaya Nakajo has been decided to be produced. In addition, a PV was also released to announce the decision to produce the second season.

entries.title: Sendai Kaiwai PV and new cast revealed for the third and final season of "Jyujutsu Kaisen" "Shiketsu Kaiwai Part 1".
entries.title_ja: 「呪術廻戦」第3期「死滅回游 前編」最終回に向け、仙台結界PV＆新キャスト公開
entries.description: The "Sendai Kaiwai PV" has arrived for the final episode of the third season of the TV anime "Jyujutsu Kaisen" (The Circumstances of Death and Destruction Part 1), written by Akutomi Gedo. It was also announced that Hiroki Toji will play the role of Ishigooriryu, Nana Mizuki will play the role of Takako Uro, and Yukihiro Notsuyama will play the role of Kuroururushi.

entries.title: List of manga magazines for sale tomorrow, Monday, March 23
entries.title_ja: 明日3月23日（月）発売分のマンガ雑誌リスト
entries.description: Comic Natalie is pleased to announce the manga magazine to be released tomorrow, Monday, March 23.

entries.title: Shirotan the seal will be adapted into a TV anime and broadcast from this fall, with Aoi Yuuki playing the role of Shirotan.
entries.title_ja: アザラシのしろたんがTVアニメ化、今秋より放送　しろたん役は悠木碧
entries.description: Shirotan, a tategoto seal character created in 1999, will be adapted into an animated TV series to be broadcast on TV Asahi starting in the fall of 2026.

entries.title: Wataru Takagi called Season 2 of "Doro Hedoro" "dense," while Kyu Hayashida said, "Please draw a cross-section.
entries.title_ja: 「ドロヘドロ」Season2は「濃い」と高木渉、林田球からは“断面描いちゃってください”
entries.description: The world's fastest screening of "Dorohedoro" Season 2, an anime written by Hayashida Ball, was held at TOHO Cinemas Hibiya in Tokyo today, March 22, with Wataru Takagi as Caiman, Reina Kondo as Nikkaidou, Koki Uchiyama as Busu Moth, and Hiroki Hamano as Tetsujo on stage.

entries.title: [March 23, 2026] List of Manga Books Released Today
entries.title_ja: 【2026年3月23日】本日発売のマンガ単行本リスト
entries.description: Comic Natalie is pleased to announce today's March 23, 2026 book release. Click here to see the list of magazines on sale today.

entries.title: Production of the second season of the anime "Dexterous Dexterity Kicked Out of a Brave Party" is decided, and a mysterious girl makes a new appearance.
entries.title_ja: アニメ「勇者パーティを追い出された器用貧乏」2期制作決定、謎の少女が新たに登場
entries.description: The production of the second season of the TV anime "Dexterity Poor, Kicked Out of a Brave Party" has been decided. In addition, a visual and PV of the second season production decision were released.

entries.title: Mayumi Tanaka will give a week of special instruction to high school students who want to become voice actors, which will be broadcast on NHK BS on March 26, 2012.
entries.title_ja: 田中真弓が声優志望の高校生に約1週間の特別指導、その模様が3月26日にNHK BSで
entries.description: Voice actress Mayumi Tanaka will appear in "Miracle Lesson" to be broadcast on NHK BS on March 26 at 19:00.

entries.title: Yoshiki Nakajima reports his marriage to a partner "who works in a different industry from his own."
entries.title_ja: 中島ヨシキが結婚を報告、相手は「自分とは違う業界でお仕事をされている方」
entries.description: Voice actor Yoshiki Nakajima announced his marriage on his official X (@Yoshiki_n_626).

entries.title: Pom Pom Pudding celebrates its 30th anniversary in April! Hero-designed plush toys and mascot are now available, including a plush toy with two cute hands that moves without batteries
entries.title_ja: ポムポムプリンが4月で30周年！ヒーローデザインのぬいぐるみとマスコットが登場電池なしで両手がかわいく動くぬいぐるみも
entries.description: Takara Tomy Arts will release a plush toy "Sanrio Characters Mocchi-Mocchi- Plushie S Pom Pom Hero" and a mascot "Sanrio Characters Mocchi-Mocchi- Chain Strap Mascot Pom Pom Hero" on April 10. The plushie S Pom Pom Hero will be priced at 2,860 yen and the chain strap mascot Pom Pom Hero at 2,420 yen.

entries.title: Figure "Misaka Mikoto: Furisode ver." from "Toaru Kagaku no Railgun T" starts shipping today!
entries.title_ja: 「とある科学の超電磁砲T」よりフィギュア「御坂美琴 振袖ver.」本日出荷開始！
entries.description: KADOKAWA will begin shipping the figure "Misaka Mikoto: Furisode ver." on March 23. The price is 29,700 yen.

entries.title: Crabmeat" crabbing under near-death conditions (Almost a Day Indie Pick Up!)
entries.title_ja: 死と隣り合わせの状況下でカニ漁をする「Crabmeat」（ほぼ日 インディーPick Up！）
entries.description: Today's "Almost a Day Indie PickUp!" introduces "Crabmeat," a first-person point-and-click survival horror game about a prisoner who is forced to go crabbing in the Antarctic Ocean to pay his debts. The game's unique control system, which allows the player to steer the ship and set and retrieve traps using only the mouse, and its unique horror storyline, in which monotonous labor itself becomes a source of fear, are highlights of the game.

entries.title: Weekly 4Gamer recaps the week in 4Gamer, March 16 - 22, 2026
entries.title_ja: 4Gamerの1週間を振り返る「Weekly 4Gamer」，2026年3月16日〜3月22日
entries.description: From March 16 to 22, 2026, the three-day weekend, 4Gamer published a total of 304 articles. Continuing from the previous week, here is a recap of the week in the world game industry and 4Gamer's coverage of the GDCFestivalofGaming2026, including some reports and the latest information on various games.

entries.title: Announced "Girls Band Cry First Riff" original new band "Canna Lily". Characters and cast were revealed and the first one-man live concert will be held in June.

The tank can not only move forward and backward, but can also perform a "super-clear turn," which is unique to tanks, as well as rotate its turret and raise and lower its gun barrel, allowing you to enjoy a variety of actions.
