entries.title: Hasegawa is re-releasing a plastic model of "School Desks and Chairs" that can be combined with 1/12 scale action figures to recreate a classroom scene! Each desk and chair comes in a set of 3 pieces, and no glue is required for assembly!
entries.title_ja: 1/12スケールのアクションフィギュアと組み合わせて教室の風景を再現できる「学校の机と椅子」のプラモデルをハセガワが再販！机と椅子それぞれ3個入り、組み立てには接着剤不要！
entries.description: Hasegawa reproduces the plastic model "School Desks and Chairs" which can be combined with 1/12 scale action figures and other items to recreate a classroom scene! The set of 3 desks and 3 chairs each costs 990 yen (tax included)! #hasegawa #plastic model

entries.title: New designs including a tempestuous face and a tearful expression are also included in the lineup! The second set of "Assassination Classroom" Mejirushi accessories for Kakusei-sensei is now available!
entries.title_ja: テンパり顔や涙を流す表情など新デザインもラインナップ！『暗殺教室』殺せんせーのめじるしアクセサリーの第2弾が登場！
entries.description: The second volume of the gashapon "Mejirushi Accessory" featuring only "Assassination Classroom" Kakusei is now available! In addition to the re-recording from the previous volume, the lineup includes new designs such as a tempestuous face and a tearful expression! #Assassination Classroom #Capsule Toy

entries.title: A round frog appears as a Mejirushi Gacha mascot! If you put it on your umbrella, the transparent feeling of the clear material and the frog will fit the atmosphere of a rainy day.
entries.title_ja: めじるしガチャマスコットにまんまるカエルが登場！傘につければクリア素材の透明感×カエルが雨の日の雰囲気にピッタリ♪
entries.description: Clear material frogs appear in the gacha figure "Manmaru Animal" series! The lineup includes four types, including the well-known Japanese "tree frog" and the "Bertsuno frog" popular as pets! #Capsule Toys

entries.title: New collaboration monster "Omegamon: "G" Fusion Mode" and other characters have been added, bringing the total number of characters in the collection to 58! The second "Digimon Pendulum COLOR" in collaboration with Godzilla is now available!
entries.title_ja: 新コラボモンスター「オメガモン：“G”融合モード」などを追加し、収録キャラクターは全58体に！ゴジラとコラボした「デジモンペンデュラムCOLOR」第2弾が登場！
entries.description: The second volume of Digimon Pendulum COLOR, a collaboration with Godzilla, is now available! Includes five new collaboration monsters, including Omegamon: "G" Fusion Mode, which evolves with the Joggles function! Now accepting reservations at Premium Bandai! #Godzilla #Dezimon

entries.title: Gyro Zeppeli from the anime "Steel Ball Run: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure" is getting a Nendoroid figure along with his beloved horse, Valkyrie!
entries.title_ja: アニメ『スティール・ボール・ラン ジョジョの奇妙な冒険』ジャイロ・ツェペリが愛馬・ヴァルキリーとともにねんどろいど化！Amazonで予約受付中!!
entries.description: From the anime "Steel Ball Run: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure" comes a Nendoroid of the mysterious outlaw "Gyro Zeppeli" who participates in the North American transcontinental race "Steel Ball Run" along with his beloved horse "Valkyrie"! Pre-orders are now being taken on Amazon! #jojo_anime

entries.title: Soul of Sole, a new project to meet tap dancers, holds member auditions.
entries.title_ja: タップダンスと巡り合う新プロジェクト「Soul of Sole」、メンバーオーディション開催
entries.description: Soul of Sole," a crossover male voice actor unit project that combines elements of anime, music, manga, and tap dance, has begun. The "1st term member audition" has been announced.

entries.title: Chopper from the drama "ONE PIECE" becomes a fluffy figure, hat removable
entries.title_ja: ドラマ「ONE PIECE」のチョッパーがもふもふフィギュアに、帽子も着脱可能
entries.description: From the drama series "ONE PIECE" Season 2, written and executive produced by Eiichiro Oda, a Chopper figure has appeared in Hot Toys' "TV Masterpiece" series.

entries.title: 100 Kano" third season will start in July. Teaser PV to hear the voice of the new heroine whose cast has not yet been announced.
entries.title_ja: 「100カノ」第3期は7月から　キャスト未発表の新ヒロインの声聞けるティザーPV
entries.description: The third season of the TV anime "Kimi no koto dai dai dai dai dai dai 100 no kanojo" written by Rikito Nakamura and Yukiko Nozawa will be broadcast in July. The teaser PV for the third season has been released.

entries.title: Rena Ueda's request at the final "Censorman" speech: "Me and my mom will be happy."
entries.title_ja: 「チェンソーマン」最後の舞台挨拶で上田麗奈がとある要望「私とお母さんが喜びます」
entries.description: The "Bursting Gyoen" of the theatrical version of "Chainsaw Man: Rezhe Arc," written by Tatsuki Fujimoto, was held at TOHO Cinemas Hibiya in Tokyo on March 21, 2012! The final stage greeting" was held at TOHO Cinemas Hibiya in Tokyo on March 21, with Kikunosuke Toya as Denji, Shogo Sakata as Aki Hayakawa, Hanabayashi Takahashi as Kobeni Higashiyama, and Rena Ueda as Reze on stage.

entries.title: Seiichiro Yamashita of "Dr.STONE" was so pleased that Yusuke Kobayashi of "Piggya" praised him.
entries.title_ja: 「Dr.STONE」山下誠一郎が喜びのあまり「ピギャー」小林裕介に褒めちぎられて
entries.description: An advance screening of the third season of the TV anime "Dr. Stone Science Future" by Riichiro Inagaki and Boichi was held at TOHO Cinemas Hibiya in Tokyo on March 21, 2012, with greetings from the stage. Yusuke Kobayashi as Senku Ishigami, Goshi Suzuki as Ryusui Nanami and Seiichiro Yamashita as SAI took the stage.

entries.title: Maebashi Witches" theater compilation film will be produced! Special video release and mini live performance at AJ!
entries.title_ja: 「前橋ウィッチーズ」劇場総集編の制作決定！特報映像公開　AJでミニライブも
entries.description: Production of the theater compilation of the original anime "Maebashi Witches" has been decided. A special trailer was released.

entries.title: Daily life is transformed over a transplanted giant penis in the comedy play "The King's Crotch Crown Shines," vol. 1.
entries.title_ja: 移植された巨チンを巡り日常が一変、コメディ活劇「王たる股冠の輝きよ」1巻
entries.description: Watanawa Watashiro Watashiro "Kings' Crowns Shine" volume 1, originally written by Mishiro Natsu, was released by Square Enix today, March 21, 2012. This is a comedy drama that begins when a giant penis implanted in an accident turns out to be that of the next head of a famous family that controls the world.

entries.title: Drama adaptation of "That night, I had the boss's child" to be broadcast in April, starring Mirei Sasaki and Masahiro Moritsugu of Super Express.
entries.title_ja: 「あの夜、社長の子供を授かりました」4月ドラマ化、佐々木美玲＆超特急・森次政裕が主演
entries.description: The TV drama "Ano Yoru, Boss no Kodomo wo Materu Shitakatta" by Shiromiya Esu, based on the original story by Natsuno Moisture, will be broadcast on MBS and other stations from April 16, 2012. The role of Shiori Hanai will be played by Mirei Sasaki, and the role of Takahito Seko will be played by Masahiro Moritsugu of Super Express.

entries.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!" 20 kinds of "Sealed Exodia" jackets, millennium puzzle pouches, etc.
entries.title_ja: 「遊☆戯☆王」封印されしエクゾディアのジャケットや千年パズルポーチなど20種
entries.description: A total of 20 collaborative items between Graniff and "Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters," an anime series written by Kazuki Takahashi, are now available for pre-order at the official Graniff online store, and will go on sale on March 24 at the official online store and at stores in Japan.

entries.title: Key visual for the theatrical anime "WITCH ON THE HOLY NIGHT," Aoko Aozaki's sharp eyes in the center of the magic circle.
entries.title_ja: 劇場アニメ「魔法使いの夜」キービジュアル、魔法陣の中心で蒼崎青子が鋭い眼光放つ
entries.description: The first key visual and visual release video for the animated film "WITCH ON THE HOLY NIGHT" have been released.

entries.title: Anime "Tenbin" to begin airing in July; cast and staff announced, including Shunichi Toki as Hayato
entries.title_ja: アニメ「てんびん」は7月から放送開始、隼人役の土岐隼一らキャスト＆スタッフ発表
entries.description: The TV anime "The case that the innocent and pretty girl who transferred to a new school was a childhood friend who I used to play with thinking she was a boy" will start airing from July on TOKYO MX, BS Fuji, and other stations. The first main visual, main characters, and cast information have been released.

entries.title: Jewel princess who turns bodily fluids into jewelry, second life no longer exploited Story of a woman seeking freedom
entries.title_ja: 体液を宝石に変える宝石姫、2度目の人生はもう搾取されない　自由を求める女性の物語
entries.description: Gorokoro Mikan. A new serial by Mitsuki Sakamoto, based on an original story, "Jewel Princess of Return to Death, Enjoys Her Second Life. started on March 20 at the WEB Zenon editorial office.

entries.title: Ritsuka Saeki [School Festival Maid Costume]" combines the cuteness of a catsuit and tail with the sexiness of a bare stomach! Sosai Fes...

entries.description: Ritsuka Saeki [School Festival Maid Costume]" presented at "Sosai Fes 5th" has a strong visual impact. The gray "prototype" on display this time is very appealing with its elaborate modeling and fun to look at atmosphere.

entries.title: New Tomica Cars: "Honda CB1000F" and "Nissan Stagea" in March! Honda's world-class motorcycle and Nissan's station wagon that took the world by storm are now available in Tomica!

entries.description: No.64 Honda CB1000F

entries.title: Beyblade X GP Final 2026 to be held in Bangkok, Thailand　Japan Tournament "BEYBLADE X GP FINAL 2026" will be held in October!
entries.title_ja: 「ベイブレード X」、2026年世界大会の舞台はバンコク！　日本大会「BEYBLADE X GP FINAL 2026」は10月開催決定
entries.description: On March 21, TOMY announced a variety of new information on the distribution program "[BEYBLADE DAY -2026-] Beyblade Latest Information Announcement Special Program. During the program, it was announced that the 2026 world championship "BEYBLADE X GP FINAL 2026" would be held in Bangkok, Thailand on December 12 and 13, 2026. This article will summarize what was announced at the distribution program.

entries.title: The sexy Chinese costume "Yakushiji Kyuon [Chinese Costume]" from "Sosai Shoujo Teien" is exhibited for the first time! Sosai Fes" package illustrations of "Accessory Set 2" and "Bonfire Maria [Combat Costume]" are also on display for the first time.
entries.title_ja: 「創彩少女庭園」よりセクシーなチャイナ衣装の「薬師寺 久遠【チャイナコスチューム】」が初展示！【創彩フェス】「小物セット2」や「篝火 真里亞【戦闘装束】」のパッケージイラストも初公開
entries.description: Kotobukiya is exhibiting the prototype of the plastic model "Hisato Yakushiji [Chinese Costume]" and other models at the "Sosai Fest 5th" event held from March 21.

entries.title: Beyblade X" announces collaboration item "BEYBLADE X CX-00 Evangelion Deck Set!　Beyblade with the image of Unit-1/Unit-0/Unit-2!
entries.title_ja: 「ベイブレード X」、コラボアイテム「BEYBLADE X CX-00 エヴァンゲリオンデッキセット」発表！　初号機/零号機/2号機をイメージしたベイブレード登場
entries.description: On March 21, Takara Tomy announced the collaboration item "BEYBLADE X CX-00 Evangelion Deck Set" on the distribution program "[BEYBLADE DAY -2026-] Beyblade Latest Information Announcement Special Program. It will be released in late August and priced at 7,500 yen. Orders will be accepted until 23:59 on April 20.

entries.title: Report on "Sosai Fes 5th", a school festival filled with illustrations by En Morikura! Sosai Fest" - Fan exchange, special dioramas, and many other attractions!
entries.title_ja: 「創彩フェス 5th」会場レポート、森倉円氏のイラスト盛りだくさんの学園祭！【創彩フェス】ファンの交流、特別ジオラマなど目玉もたくさん
entries.description: On March 21 and 22, Kotobukiya is holding "Sosai Fes 5th" at KOTOBUKIYA-Hall in Tachikawa, Tokyo, to celebrate the 5th anniversary of the release of the "Sosai Shoujo Teien" bishojo plastic models. Admission is free.

entries.title: Damaged fighting girl "Yakushiji Kyuon [Bonfire Maria Damaged Ver!　Appeared together with a fake with the same appearance, "Emulation" [Sosai Fes].
entries.title_ja: ダメージを負った戦う少女「薬師寺 久遠【篝火 真里亞ダメージVer.】」！　姿が同じ偽物、「エミュレーション」とともに登場【創彩フェス】
entries.description: In the "Sosai Shoujo Teien" series of plastic models of various characters based on the theme of high school girls, "Kyuon Yakushiji" is a character with a somewhat special feeling. She is an "actress-genius" who plays a variety of roles. At the event, two models based on the character she plays, "Yakushiji Hisato [Bonfire Maria Damaged Ver.]" and "Yakushiji Hisato [Bonfire Maria Damaged Ver.] Dreaming Style School Girl Emulation," were presented and coloring samples were displayed.

entries.title: The glossy texture of the swimsuit!　Rui Saotome [Momozakura High School, Swimsuit Race]" is a swimsuit with a glossy texture.
entries.title_ja: つやつやの水着の質感！　「早乙女 瑠衣【桃桜高校・競泳水着】」は顔に手を当てる仕草に注目【創彩フェス】
entries.description: At the "Sosai Fest 5th" held to commemorate the 5th anniversary of the release of the "Sosai Shoujo Teien" bishojo plastic models, a number of new items were announced. Rui Saotome [Momozakura High School Swimsuit]" and "Rui Saotome [Momozakura High School Swimsuit] Dreaming Style White Dolphin" were among them. The release date and price have not yet been determined, but orders will be taken on March 24, when details will be revealed.

entries.title: Steam Spring Sale 2026" - First Sale and Lowest Priced Games. There are also some recommended picks for those who want to take this opportunity to explore new titles.
entries.title_ja: 「Steamスプリングセール2026」初セール＆最安値作品まとめ。この機会に新しい作品を探りたい人向けのオススメ作品ピックアップもあるよ
entries.description: Steam Spring Sale 2026, the first of the annual large-scale seasonal sales held on Steam in 2026, has begun. For those who want to stock up on games they can play at their leisure before their costly new lives begin, we've compiled a list of the lowest-priced and first-sale titles for you this time as well!

entries.title: Yui's HoaeHoae Game Speech: No.261 ""Paranoma Site FILE38: Ise Mermaid's Tale", Impressions up to the middle stage & I want to talk about what I'm interested in in the future" *Spoiler Alert!
entries.title_ja: 結のほえほえゲーム演説：第261回「『パラノマサイト FILE38 伊勢人魚物語』，中盤までの感想＆この先で気になることを話したい」※ネタバレ注意
entries.description: The new "FILE38 Ise Mermaid's Tale" by my favorite "Paranoma Site" is too interesting!　I think I'm probably in the middle of the story.　Yui-san, who has reached the halfway point of the story, will talk about his impressions so far and the mysteries and deductions that interest him in the future. (We recommend that you read this article after clearing the game.

entries.title: ［Interview] "Living on a Deserted Island Somewhere" - A Worldview Linked to Reality - "I.ADORE" R01 Cast Talks about the Story and New Song "ARCANA
entries.title_ja: ［インタビュー］「どこかの無人島で生きている」現実とリンクする世界観――「I.ADORE」R01キャストが語る物語と新曲「ARCANA」
entries.description: I.ADORE" is about nine young men reincarnated on a deserted island and living together to become idols. Kaoru Mitsuhashi, Katsuya Fukunishi, and Kaoto Udagawa, who play R01 in this work, talked about the world view, their thoughts on the characters, and the appeal of the new song "ARCANA.

entries.title: TOKYO INDIE GAMES SUMMIT 2026" is held today. On-site report on an indie game event that connects with the city.
entries.title_ja: 「TOKYO INDIE GAMES SUMMIT 2026」本日開催。街とつながるインディーゲームイベントを現地レポート
entries.description: TOKYOINDIEGAMESSUMMIT2026, an indie game event to be held today (March 21, 2026) in Koenji, Tokyo, will report on the atmosphere of the event through a look at the Business Day held the day before. The venue, a former elementary school, is filled with unique games from the first to third floors. Let's enjoy every inch of the venue so as not to miss out on any new gaming experiences.

entries.title: Kenji Iino's new "One-Dot Games" collection of five free games will be released on May 17.
entries.title_ja: 飯野賢治氏が着想した“1ドットゲーム”の新作「ONE-DOT GAMES」のリリースが5月17日に決定。5種類のタイトルを収録した無料ゲームコレクション
entries.description: From Yellow to Orange announced the release of its new smartphone app "ONE-DOTGAMES" on May 17. The price is free. The game collection is based on game creator Kenji Iino's 2009 "one-dotenemies" and includes five unique titles created from a single dot.

entries.title: Weekly Steam Square No. 145: Sandbox Survival "Everwind" and "DEATH STRANDING" for PC
entries.title_ja: 週刊Steam広場 第145号：サンドボックスサバイバル「Everwind」やPC版「DEATH STRANDING」が発売に
entries.description: This week's edition of "Weekly Steam Plaza" brings you information on notable Steam titles and sales that went on sale this week. This week, the PC versions of "Everwind," a sandbox survival RPG set in a skyworld where the sky meets the sea, and "DEATHSTRANDING2," an open world game in which you deliver packages and reconnect humanity in a world that has collapsed due to supernatural phenomena, were released.

entries.title: [March 21, 2026] List of Manga Books Released Today
entries.title_ja: 【2026年3月21日】本日発売のマンガ単行本リスト
entries.description: Comic Natalie is pleased to announce today's March 21, 2026 book release. Click here to see the list of magazines on sale today.

entries.title: Saint Seiya" will be serialized in a new "Heavenly Realm Arc" series, and "From Beyond" will be adapted into a TV anime.
entries.title_ja: 【今週の注目記事】「聖闘士星矢」の新作“天界篇”連載決定、「彼方から」TVアニメ化
entries.description: From March 12 to March 18, 2026, the most popular article in Comic Natalie was a news article about the new "Saint Seiya" "Heavenly Realm Arc.

entries.title: MG 1/100 Gundam Vulculus Extension Parts Set" is on display. Check out the power of the Valkyria Buster Sword [Gundam Base photo].
entries.title_ja: 「MG 1/100 ガンダムバルバトスルプス用 拡張パーツセット」が展示中。ヴァルキュリアバスターソードの迫力をチェック【ガンダムベース撮り下ろし】
entries.description: An expansion parts set for the "MG 1/100 Gundam Barbatos Lupus" is now available through Premium Bandai, and the first pre-order users received their shipment in February. Samples of these parts are now on display at Gundam Base Tokyo.

entries.title: We took down the "RG 1/144 Gundam Base Limited Edition Gundam Epion [Special Coating]" which will be released on March 20. The brightness of the plating is very beautiful! Gundam Base new photos!
entries.title_ja: 3月20日発売の「RG 1/144 ガンダムベース限定 ガンダムエピオン [スペシャルコーティング]」を撮り下ろし。メッキの輝きが映える！【ガンダムベース撮り下ろし】
entries.description: Gundam Base's limited item "RG 1/144 Gundam Base Limited Gundam Epion [Special Coating]" will be released on March 20. A sample of this item is on display at Gundam Base Tokyo.

entries.title: Plastic model "Figure-rise Standard Kamen Rider Shin-1" from "Kamen Rider" is released today!

entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will release a plastic model "Figure-rise Standard Kamen Rider Shin-1" on March 21. The price is 4,180 yen.

entries.title: HG 1/144 MSN-04II Nightingale [Clear Color]" now on sale!　The large MS that appears in the novel is molded in bright clear red [Gundam Base photo].
entries.title_ja: 「HG 1/144 MSN-04II ナイチンゲール [クリアカラー]」発売中！　小説に登場の大型MSを鮮やかなクリアレッドで成形【ガンダムベース撮り下ろし】
entries.description: The limited item "HG 1/144 MSN-04II Nightingale [clear color]" released last August was reproduced, and a completed sample of it was displayed at Gundam Base Tokyo.

entries.description: From the movie "Mobile Suit Gundam: Senko no Hathaway Kilkee no Majo" currently in theaters, the "Ξ Gundam" that is the star of the movie will be released in April as a new "HG 1/144 Ξ Gundam (Mobile Suit Gundam: Senko no Hathaway Kilkee no Majo.jpg" with new sculpted parts. A sample of this model is on display at Gundam Base Tokyo.

entries.title: A plastic model "Figure-rise Standard Amplified -The Three Descended Gods- Osiris no Tenku Ryu" is released today from "Yu-Gi-Oh!
entries.title_ja: 「遊☆戯☆王」よりプラモデル「Figure-rise Standard Amplified -三幻神降臨- オシリスの天空竜」本日発売！
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will release a plastic model "Figure-rise Standard Amplified -Three Phantom Gods Descending- Sky Dragon of Osiris" on March 21. The price is 9,900 yen.

entries.title: Tamiya released the plastic model "1/24 Porsche 934 Turbo RSR Vaillant" for resale today!

entries.title: Plastic model "HG 1/100 VF-25F Messiah Valkyrie (Alto Saotome)" from "Macross F" is released today! A deluxe set with exclusive water transfer decals and acuta is also released on the same day!

entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will release the plastic model "HG 1/100 VF-25F Messiah Valkyrie (by Alto Saotome)" on March 21. The price is 4,730 yen. The "HG 1/100 VF-25F Messiah Valkyrie (Alto Saotome) Water Transfer Decal" will be available for 770 yen, and the "HG 1/100 VF-25F Messiah Valkyrie (Alto Saotome) Deluxe Set" for 7,480 yen.

entries.title: Fumbari~nu 3" [Gacha Shooting] - Reproduction of doggies' fumbari scenes down to their butts! Huskies and popular small dog Pekinese appear!
entries.title_ja: 「ふんばり～ぬ3」【ガチャ撮り下ろし】ワンちゃんたちのふんばりシーンをお尻まで再現！ハスキーや人気の小型犬ペキニーズが登場
entries.description: The "Fumbari~nu 3" gacha will be released by Takara Tomy Arts in late March. The "Fumbari-Nu 3" mini-figures feature a variety of dogs in a "moment of gusto". entries.title: Cover Inc. settles defamation claim against Hololive talent, announces more than 30 more legal actions in the future.

entries.description:
On March 19, 2026, Cover Inc. announced that it has identified and reached a settlement with a person who committed infringement on the rights to the talent belonging to its VTuber agency, Hololive Productions. The subject person had made false and factual […] statements about the talent belonging to the company on social networking sites.
The post Cover Inc. Reaches Settlement for Defamation of Hololive Talent, Announces More Than 30 More Legal Actions to Come appeared first on Mogura VR.

entries.title: Crane Game Research: Genealogy, Archeology, and Media Theory" (Book Guide for Gamers: No. 58)

entries.description: The crane game, with its simple mechanism of manipulating an arm inside a box to drop a prize, has an indescribable appeal. Where did these machines, which are now the flower of arcade games, come from? This book, "Crane Game Research: Genealogy, Kogaku, and Media Theory," is a book that answers such questions.

The currency is batteries, and you are free to help or abandon your customers. The chaotic store creation awaits you, where goods are blown off the shelves by physics calculations.

entries.title: What is this "knowledge unlocking" that we hear so much about these days?　Why is it called that?　What are some of the best examples?　Let us try to explain all the questions that come to mind.
entries.title_ja: 最近よく聞く“知識アンロック系”ってなに？　そう呼ばれるようになった理由は？　代表作は？　思いついた疑問を全部まとめて解説してみる
entries.description: If you have been following game information recently, you may have come across the term "knowledge unlocking" from time to time. Some people are vaguely familiar with it, while others may ask, "When did this term originate?　Is it a game genre? Some may even say, "When did this term originate? I've been thinking a lot about this extremely useful but not yet widely used term (genre name).

entries.description: Announced on March 20, Warner Bros. Japanese theatrical release date for the live-action film "Mortal Kombat: Next Round" is set for June 5, 2026. The film is a sequel to the game's original story.

entries.title: Anime and games nationwide [this weekend, Friday, March 20, 2026 - Sunday, March 22, 2026].

entries.description: Information on anime and game events this weekend. Ghost in the Shell Exhibition, Detective Conan Osaka Castle Honjin SPECIAL SHOP, "Tensei Takera Tareta Slymu Datta Koto" Special Exhibition, SQUARE ENIX POP UP CAFE x Dragon Quest VII, and more.

entries.title: Red Desert" will be released on March 20! Open world action adventure derived from "Black Desert

entries.description: Pearl Abyss' new RPG "Red Desert" will be available on March 20, 2026, for PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X|S, starting at ¥9,680 for the Standard Edition.

entries.title: Open-world action "Red Desert" is now available on Steam, and has immediately started to thrive with about "240,000" contacts on Steam.
entries.title_ja: オープンワールドアクション『紅の砂漠』発売開始。Steamではさっそく同接約「24万人」の盛況スタート
entries.description: Pearl Abyss' new game, "Red Desert," launches March 20 on PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam), and has reached its highest concurrent user count of about 240,000 on Steam, with over 3 million wish lists.

entries.title: The film "Project Hail Mary" opens in theaters on March 20.
entries.title_ja: 映画『プロジェクト・ヘイル・メアリー』が3月20日より公開
entries.description: The film "Project Hail Mary" opens in theaters on March 20. Also, the "Resident Evil RE:2" and "RE:3" sets are on sale for 77% off on Steam for $1,377.

entries.title: eSports Team "REJECT" VALORANT Division, VCJ Split 1 Main Stage Begins

entries.title: Rosalinde from "Unicorn Overlord" is now available as a 1/6 scale figure from Fat Company!

entries.title: The delicious-looking bread is sculpted in BIG size and plushy touch! Gashapon Figure "Machaboke Puni Puni: The Case of the Bread" is now available!

entries.title: Prime 1 Studio presents a 1/4 scale statue of Atsushi, the main character from "Ghost of Yotei"! The vengeful "ghost" has been sculpted and painted in a truly convincing manner!

The vengeful "grudge" figure has been precisely reproduced down to the smallest detail! In addition to the regular version, DX and DX Bonus versions are also available! #Ghost of Yotei #Prime1Studio

entries.title: Monster Scene, a horror-inspired snap kit from the 1970s, is being reissued by Dencom in the 55th anniversary package! The lineup includes four items, including a frightened woman and a terrifying torture device!

entries.title: Minimoni. Telephone! Ring Ring Ring" and ringtones are played! Mini Moni. Telephone" is now available as a product in a "mini Moni" version for adults!

Telephone" has been commercialized as a product with the specifications for adults to become "Minimoni! Press the button to get "Minimoni. Telephone! Ring Ring Ring" and ringtones will be played when the button is pressed! #Mini Moni

entries.title: Aoshima, Hasegawa, and Tamiya will be open for tours along with the Shizuoka Hobby Show. Plan to/from Tokyo Shinagawa Station also available.

entries.description: TIPS will offer tours that include visits to Aoshima, Tamiya, and Hasegawa headquarters in conjunction with the 64th Shizuoka Hobby Show scheduled to be held at Twinmesse Shizuoka from May 13 to 17. Prices start at 15,800 yen.

entries.title: From the "Mechatro Wego" series, Hasegawa re-releases a set of two plastic models of Wego, inspired by the anime "Hello WeGo! Connect the parts together and the arms extend with a whizzing motion!

entries.description: Hasegawa is pleased to announce the return of the Mechatro Wego kit inspired by the anime "Hello WeGo! The kit comes as a set of two figures, one in the blue Akira color and the other in the mint green Satoru color, with multiple arms that can be connected and extended! #Hasegawa #HelloWeGo

entries.title: Elf Village Festival in Amiami Akihabara Radio Kaikan Store

Elf Village Festival in Amiami Akihabara Radio Kaikan Store" is being held from March 20 (Fri.) to April 5 (Sun.), 2026 at Amiami Akihabara Radio Kaikan event space. Amiami News had the pleasure of covering the event on Friday, March 20, 2026 […].

entries.title: McDonald's] I played with Happy Set "Doraemon" ahead of time! A large number of toys based on the motif of "Doraemon the Movie: Nobita's New Undersea Oniwashiro Castle"!

Prices may differ at some stores. Each toy will be available in limited quantities and will end as soon as they are gone.

entries.title: Fujimi Models' 1/700 full hull kit of the "YAMATO" and "MUSASHI" from the "1/700 Imperial Navy Series" is now available! Special specification with etched parts and wooden deck stickers included!

Both kits come with etched parts and wood deck stickers that reproduce irregular wood grain patterns using a laser cutter! #fujimi models #plastic model

entries.title: Hobby Shop Visit] Model trains are the mainstay of the store!　Report on "Kuru Kuru Akihabara," a secondhand specialty store, with a large layout that can accommodate up to 15 cars and a variety of expressions of the railroad tracks, capturing the hearts of fans.

entries.description: Hobby is a hobby in which one is "surrounded by things. Figurines, plastic models, RC, model trains, dolls, and so on. Before the "I'm satisfied with all I have" tongue is even dry, the desire to search for and buy new products grows, and as a result, the number of new items in the house increases.

During the photo session, a stuffed animal of Kakushi Sensei also made an appearance.

entries.title: Little Kitty Big City" will be released by SEGA on June 18 for the Switch as a packaged version.

entries.description: On March 19, 2026, Sega announced that a packaged version of "Little Kitty Big City - Maigo no Kitten no Machi Sanpo" for Switch will be released on June 18. The price is 3980 yen (including tax). The game is a casual adventure game in which the main character, a black cat who has become separated from her owner, wanders around an open-world city, trying to return home.

entries.title: AYANEO Pocket S mini, a compact portable Android game console with an approx. 4.2-inch size display, goes on sale in Japan on March 26.

entries.description: On March 19, 2026, Tenku announced the release of AYANEO's AYANEOPocketSmin "i portable Android gaming device on March 26. The highlight of this product is its small body with an LCD display of approximately 4.2 inches in size, with a resolution of 1280 x 960 dots and an aspect ratio of 4:3. The price, including tax, starts at 77,800 yen.

entries.title: Lead an interstellar freighter through the galaxy. New Sci-Fi Rogue RPG "Stellar Freight: Endless Horizon" to be Released in Q3 2026

The game is a sci-fi roguelike turn-based RPG in which players captain an interstellar freighter and lead their crew through the perils of space.

entries.title: Unity Studio, the official Unity editor for creating 3D apps in the browser, is officially released. Free trial is now available.

entries.description:
Official Release of Unity Studio, an Official Unity Tool for Creating 3D Applications in the Browser
No-code animation application, UI creation, etc. are possible. In addition to paid licenses, free trials are also available.
Available for WebGPU compatible browsers (Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, etc.). Mobile browsers are not supported at the time of the announcement.

entries.title: KAZUMA KANEKO'S TSUQUYOMI" reveals five playable characters and battle styles. Enjoy the story depicted from the viewpoints of the agent and the mastermind.

entries.title: The official website for the rogue light action "Kunio's Hot-Blooded Journey to the West: Jersey Rampage" is now open. Sun Wukong, Inoha-kai, Sa-go-jyo, and Sanzo Houshi are all "Kunio".

entries.title: Blender 5.1" is officially released. Bone Info" node for procedural rigging with enhanced linkage between armature and geometry nodes, etc. implemented.
entries.title_ja: 「Blender 5.1」正式リリース。アーマチュアとジオメトリノードの連携強化によりプロシージャルリギングを実現する「Bone Info」ノードなどが実装
entries.description:
March 17, 2026 (local time), the official release of Blender 5.1
Bone Info, an Input node that allows users to obtain transformation information from bones in armatures, has been added to the Geometry node.
Improved processing speed of shape keys and actions, and enhanced grease pencil fill functionality have also been implemented.

entries.title: GIMP 3.2, an open source image editing tool, is officially released. New non-destructive layers "Link Layer" and "Vector Layer" are implemented.

entries.description:
GIMP, an Open Source Image Editing Tool, Updated to Version 3.2
New non-destructive layers "Link Layer" and "Vector Layer" are implemented.
Enhanced color selection function and UI/UX improvements were also added.

entries.description:
Graphics Programming Conference 2025, a Conference Focusing on Graphics Technology, Presentation Materials and Archived Videos Now Available
Presentation materials are available for 30 lectures, including lectures on rendering and optimization techniques using Unreal Engine 5 and Cycles, the standard Blender renderer.
Eight archived videos are now available. including a lecture on "Battlefield 6" development case study.

New features include "Curves Brushes" for drawing paths along mesh surfaces, image stabilization, and new mesh filters.
InstaMAT" is free for projects with annual revenues of less than $100,000.

entries.title: KPOP Girls!" is the first game in the KPOP series. Demon Hunters" uses UE's real-time rendering for high-quality 3D scenes; Epic Games releases production interview article
entries.title_ja: 『KPOPガールズ! デーモン・ハンターズ』はUEのリアルタイムレンダリングで高品質の3Dシーンを実現。Epic Gamesが制作インタビュー記事を公開
entries.description:
3D Animated Film "KPOP Girls! Interview with the production team about the use of UE in "Demon Hunters," published by Epic Games.
UE's real-time rendering enables highly accurate pre-visualization. As a specific example, a case study of a battle scene in a public bathhouse created with Volumetric is presented.
The article also discusses efforts to automate the workflow of importing animation rigs created in Maya into UE.
